title: MOOSE-Star: Unlocking Tractable Training for Scientific Discovery by Breaking the Complexity Barrier
authors: Zonglin Yang, Lidong Bing
abstract: While large language models (LLMs) show promise in scientific discovery, existing research focuses on inference or feedback-driven training, leaving the direct modeling of the generative reasoning process, $P(\text{hypothesis}|\text{background})$ ($P(h|b)$), unexplored. We demonstrate that directly training $P(h|b)$ is mathematically intractable due to the combinatorial complexity ($O(N^k)$) inherent in retrieving and composing inspirations from a vast knowledge base. To break this barrier, we introduce MOOSE-Star, a unified framework enabling tractable training and scalable inference. In the best case, MOOSE-Star reduces complexity from exponential to logarithmic ($O(\log N)$) by (1) training on decomposed subtasks derived from the probabilistic equation of discovery, (2) employing motivation-guided hierarchical search to enable logarithmic retrieval and prune irrelevant subspaces, and (3) utilizing bounded composition for robustness against retrieval noise. To facilitate this, we release TOMATO-Star, a dataset of 108,717 decomposed papers (38,400 GPU hours) for training. Furthermore, we show that while brute-force sampling hits a ''complexity wall,'' MOOSE-Star exhibits continuous test-time scaling.
title_zh: MOOSE-Star：打破复杂性壁垒，解锁科学发现的可训练性
abstract_zh: 尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）在科学发现方面展现出巨大潜力，但现有研究主要集中在推理或基于反馈的训练上，而对生成性推理过程 $P(\text{假设}|\text{背景})$（即 $P(h|b)$）的直接建模仍处于空白状态。我们证明，直接训练 $P(h|b)$ 在数学上是不可行的，原因在于从海量知识库中检索并组合灵感所固有的组合复杂性（$O(N^k)$）。为突破这一瓶颈，我们提出了 MOOSE-Star——一个统一的框架，实现了可计算的训练与可扩展的推理。在理想情况下，MOOSE-Star 将复杂度从指数级降低至对数级（$O(\log N)$），其核心机制包括：（1）基于发现的概率方程分解出子任务进行训练；（2）采用动机引导的分层搜索，实现对数级检索并剪枝无关子空间；（3）使用有界组合策略，增强对检索噪声的鲁棒性。为支持该框架，我们发布了 TOMATO-Star 数据集，包含 108,717 篇经过分解的论文（总计 38,400 GPU 小时的训练资源）。此外，我们还发现，尽管暴力采样方法会遭遇“复杂性墙”，MOOSE-Star 却展现出持续的测试时扩展能力。

title: ErrorLLM: Modeling SQL Errors for Text-to-SQL Refinement
authors: Zijin Hong, Hao Chen, Zheng Yuan, Qinggang Zhang, Luyao Zhuang, Qing Liao, Feiran Huang, Yangqiu Song, Xiao Huang
abstract: Despite the remarkable performance of large language models (LLMs) in text-to-SQL (SQL generation), correctly producing SQL queries remains challenging during initial generation. The SQL refinement task is subsequently introduced to correct syntactic and semantic errors in generated SQL queries. However, existing paradigms face two major limitations: (i) self-debugging becomes increasingly ineffective as modern LLMs rarely produce explicit execution errors that can trigger debugging signals; (ii) self-correction exhibits low detection precision due to the lack of explicit error modeling grounded in the question and schema, and suffers from severe hallucination that frequently corrupts correct SQLs. In this paper, we propose ErrorLLM, a framework that explicitly models text-to-SQL Errors within a dedicated LLM for text-to-SQL refinement. Specifically, we represent the user question and database schema as structural features, employ static detection to identify execution failures and surface mismatches, and extend ErrorLLM's semantic space with dedicated error tokens that capture categorized implicit semantic error types. Through a well-designed training strategy, we explicitly model these errors with structural representations, enabling the LLM to detect complex implicit errors by predicting dedicated error tokens. Guided by the detected errors, we perform error-guided refinement on the SQL structure by prompting LLMs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ErrorLLM achieves the most significant improvements over backbone initial generation. Further analysis reveals that detection quality directly determines refinement effectiveness, and ErrorLLM addresses both sides by high detection F1 score while maintain refinement effectiveness.
title_zh: ErrorLLM：用于文本到SQL优化的SQL错误建模
abstract_zh: 尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）在文本到SQL（SQL生成）任务中表现出色，但在初始生成阶段仍难以正确产出SQL查询。为此，后续引入了SQL优化任务，以修正生成SQL中的语法和语义错误。然而，现有范式面临两大主要局限：（i）随着现代LLMs极少产生可触发调试信号的显式执行错误，自我调试的有效性逐渐降低；（ii）自我修正的检测精度较低，原因在于缺乏基于问题和数据库模式的显式错误建模，且容易出现严重幻觉，频繁破坏原本正确的SQL语句。本文提出ErrorLLM框架，通过专用LLM显式建模文本到SQL中的各类错误，用于文本到SQL的优化。具体而言，我们将用户问题和数据库模式表示为结构化特征，采用静态检测方法识别执行失败和表层不匹配，并通过引入专门的错误标记扩展ErrorLLM的语义空间，以捕捉分类后的隐式语义错误类型。通过精心设计的训练策略，我们利用结构化表示显式建模这些错误，使LLM能够通过预测专用错误标记来检测复杂的隐式错误。在检测到错误后，我们基于错误引导对SQL结构进行优化，通过提示（prompting）方式驱动LLM完成修正。大量实验表明，ErrorLLM在骨干模型初始生成的基础上实现了最显著的性能提升。进一步分析揭示，检测质量直接决定了优化效果，而ErrorLLM在保持优化有效性的同时，实现了较高的检测F1分数，有效兼顾了检测与修正两个方面。

title: CONCUR: Benchmarking LLMs for Concurrent Code Generation
authors: Jue Huang, Tarek Mahmud, Corina Pasareanu, Guowei Yang
abstract: Leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) for code generation has increasingly emerged as a common practice in the domain of software engineering. Relevant benchmarks have been established to evaluate the code generation capabilities of LLMs. However, existing benchmarks focus primarily on sequential code, lacking the ability to effectively evaluate LLMs on concurrent code generation. Compared to sequential code, concurrent code exhibits greater complexity and possesses unique types of bugs, such as deadlocks and race conditions, that do not occur in sequential code. Therefore, a benchmark for evaluating sequential code generation cannot be useful for evaluating concurrent code generation with LLMs. To address this gap, we designed a benchmark CONCUR specifically aimed at evaluating the capability of LLMs to generate concurrent code. CONCUR consists of a base set of 43 concurrency problems derived from a standard concurrency textbook, together with 72 validated mutant variants, resulting in 115 total problems. The base problems serve as the semantic core of the benchmark, while the mutants expand linguistic and structural diversity. We conducted an evaluation of a range of LLMs on CONCUR, highlighting limitations of current models. Overall, our work provides a novel direction for evaluating the capability of LLMs to generate code with focus on concurrency.
title_zh: CONCUR：用于并发代码生成的大型语言模型基准测试
abstract_zh: 利用大型语言模型（LLMs）进行代码生成在软件工程领域正变得越来越普遍。相关基准测试已建立，用于评估LLMs的代码生成能力。然而，现有基准主要关注顺序代码，缺乏有效评估LLMs在并发代码生成方面能力的能力。与顺序代码相比，并发代码具有更高的复杂性，并存在顺序代码中不会出现的独特类型错误，如死锁和竞态条件。因此，仅针对顺序代码生成的基准无法有效用于评估LLMs在并发代码生成方面的表现。为填补这一空白，我们设计了一个名为CONCUR的基准，专门用于评估LLMs生成并发代码的能力。CONCUR包含从一本标准并发编程教材中提取的43个基础并发问题，以及72个经过验证的变异版本，共计115个问题。基础问题构成了该基准的语义核心，而变异问题则扩展了语言和结构上的多样性。我们对一系列LLMs在CONCUR上的表现进行了评估，揭示了当前模型的局限性。总体而言，我们的工作为评估LLMs生成并发代码的能力提供了新的研究方向。

title: Pointer-CAD: Unifying B-Rep and Command Sequences via Pointer-based Edges & Faces Selection
authors: Dacheng Qi, Chenyu Wang, Jingwei Xu, Tianzhe Chu, Zibo Zhao, Wen Liu, Wenrui Ding, Yi Ma, Shenghua Gao
abstract: Constructing computer-aided design (CAD) models is labor-intensive but essential for engineering and manufacturing. Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have inspired the LLM-based CAD generation by representing CAD as command sequences. But these methods struggle in practical scenarios because command sequence representation does not support entity selection (e.g. faces or edges), limiting its ability to support complex editing operations such as chamfer or fillet. Further, the discretization of a continuous variable during sketch and extrude operations may result in topological errors. To address these limitations, we present Pointer-CAD, a novel LLM-based CAD generation framework that leverages a pointer-based command sequence representation to explicitly incorporate the geometric information of B-rep models into sequential modeling. In particular, Pointer-CAD decomposes CAD model generation into steps, conditioning the generation of each subsequent step on both the textual description and the B-rep generated from previous steps. Whenever an operation requires the selection of a specific geometric entity, the LLM predicts a Pointer that selects the most feature-consistent candidate from the available set. Such a selection operation also reduces the quantization error in the command sequence-based representation. To support the training of Pointer-CAD, we develop a data annotation pipeline that produces expert-level natural language descriptions and apply it to build a dataset of approximately 575K CAD models. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that Pointer-CAD effectively supports the generation of complex geometric structures and reduces segmentation error to an extremely low level, achieving a significant improvement over prior command sequence methods, thereby significantly mitigating the topological inaccuracies introduced by quantization error.
title_zh: Pointer-CAD：通过基于指针的边与面选择统一B-Rep与命令序列
abstract_zh: 构建计算机辅助设计（CAD）模型虽然耗时费力，但在工程与制造领域至关重要。近年来，大型语言模型（LLMs）的发展启发了基于LLM的CAD生成方法，这些方法将CAD模型表示为命令序列。然而，这类方法在实际应用中面临挑战，因为命令序列表示无法支持几何实体的选择（如面或边），从而限制了其对复杂编辑操作（如倒角或圆角）的支持能力。此外，在草图绘制和拉伸等操作中对连续变量进行离散化，可能导致拓扑错误。为解决上述局限性，我们提出了一种新型基于LLM的CAD生成框架——Pointer-CAD，该框架采用基于指针的命令序列表示方法，将B-rep模型的几何信息显式地融入序列建模过程。具体而言，Pointer-CAD将CAD模型生成分解为多个步骤，每一步的生成均基于文本描述以及前序步骤生成的B-rep模型进行条件化。当某项操作需要选择特定几何实体时，LLM会预测一个“指针”（Pointer），从可用候选集中选出最符合特征的实体。这种选择机制不仅提升了生成的准确性，还有效降低了基于命令序列表示带来的量化误差。为支持Pointer-CAD的训练，我们设计了一套数据标注流程，生成了专家级的自然语言描述，并基于此构建了一个包含约57.5万CAD模型的数据集。大量实验结果表明，Pointer-CAD能够有效生成复杂的几何结构，将分割误差降至极低水平，显著优于以往的命令序列方法，从而大幅缓解了因量化误差引发的拓扑不准确问题。

title: Scalable Join Inference for Large Context Graphs
authors: Shivani Tripathi, Ravi Shetye, Shi Qiao, Alekh Jindal
abstract: Context graphs are essential for modern AI applications including question answering, pattern discovery, and data analysis. Building accurate context graphs from structured databases requires inferring join relationships between entities. Invalid joins introduce ambiguity and duplicate records, compromising graph quality. We present a scalable join inference approach combining statistical pruning with Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning. Unlike purely statistics-based methods, our hybrid approach mimics human semantic understanding while mitigating LLM hallucination through data-driven inference. We first identify primary key candidates and use LLMs for adjudication, then detect inclusion dependencies with the same two-stage process. This statistics-LLM combination scales to large schemas while maintaining accuracy and minimizing false positives. We further leverage the database query history to refine the join inferences over time as the query workloads evolve. Our evaluation on TPC-DS, TPC-H, BIRD-Dev, and production workloads demonstrates that the approach achieves high precision (78-100%) on well-structured schemas, while highlighting the inherent difficulty of join discovery in poorly normalized settings.
title_zh: 大规模上下文图的可扩展连接推断
abstract_zh: 上下文图对于现代人工智能应用（如问答系统、模式发现和数据分析）至关重要。从结构化数据库构建准确的上下文图，需要推断实体之间的连接关系。无效的连接会引入歧义和重复记录，从而损害图的质量。本文提出了一种可扩展的连接推断方法，结合了统计剪枝与大型语言模型（LLM）的推理能力。与纯基于统计的方法不同，我们的混合方法在模仿人类语义理解的同时，通过数据驱动的推理有效缓解了LLM的幻觉问题。我们首先识别主键候选，并利用LLM进行仲裁；随后采用相同的两阶段流程检测包含依赖关系。这种统计与LLM相结合的方法能够在保持高准确率并最小化误报的同时，扩展至大型模式。此外，我们还利用数据库的查询历史记录，随着查询负载的变化动态优化连接推断结果。在TPC-DS、TPC-H、BIRD-Dev以及生产环境工作负载上的评估表明，该方法在结构良好的模式上实现了78%至100%的高精度，同时揭示了在规范化程度较低的场景下连接发现的固有挑战。

title: A Core Calculus for Type-safe Product Lines of C Programs
authors: Ferruccio Damiani, Daisuke Kimura, Luca Paolini, Makoto Tatsuta
abstract: In this paper we: (1) propose Lightweight C (LC), namely a core calculus that formalizes a proper subset of the ANSI C without preprocessor directives; (2) define Colored LC (CLC), namely LC endowed with ANSI C preprocessor directives; and (3) define a type system for CLC that guarantees that all programs to be generated by the C preprocessor are well-typed C programs. We believe that the simple formalization provided by CLC could be useful also for teaching purposes. Stefano Berardi spent most of his academic career at the Department of Computer Science of the University of Turin, where he conducts outstanding research on the logical foundations of computer science and on type-based program analyses. Over the years, he taught many courses, from BSc courses on programming with C to PhD courses on program analysis. Therefore, this paper fully falls within Stefano Berardi's research and teaching activities.
title_zh: 一种用于C程序类型安全产品线的核心演算
abstract_zh: 本文中，我们：（1）提出了轻量级C语言（LC），即一个形式化定义了ANSI C的一个适当子集的核演算，该子集不包含预处理器指令；（2）定义了带颜色的轻量级C语言（CLC），即在LC基础上引入ANSI C预处理器指令的扩展；（3）为CLC定义了一个类型系统，确保由C预处理器生成的所有程序均为类型正确的C程序。我们认为，CLC所提供的简洁形式化表达，也可能在教学中具有实用价值。斯特凡诺·贝拉迪（Stefano Berardi）在其学术生涯的大部分时间里任职于都灵大学计算机科学系，长期致力于计算机科学的逻辑基础以及基于类型的程序分析研究。多年来，他讲授了众多课程，从本科层次的C语言编程课程到博士层次的程序分析课程。因此，本文完全契合斯特凡诺·贝拉迪的研究与教学活动。

title: From Threat Intelligence to Firewall Rules: Semantic Relations in Hybrid AI Agent and Expert System Architectures
authors: Chiara Bonfanti, Davide Colaiacomo, Luca Cagliero, Cataldo Basile
abstract: Web security demands rapid response capabilities to evolving cyber threats. Agentic Artificial Intelligence (AI) promises automation, but the need for trustworthy security responses is of the utmost importance. This work investigates the role of semantic relations in extracting information for sensitive operational tasks, such as configuring security controls for mitigating threats. To this end, it proposes to leverage hypernym-hyponym textual relations to extract relevant information from Cyber Threat Intelligence (CTI) reports. By leveraging a neuro-symbolic approach, the multi-agent system automatically generates CLIPS code for an expert system creating firewall rules to block malicious network traffic. Experimental results show the superior performance of the hypernym-hyponym retrieval strategy compared to various baselines and the higher effectiveness of the agentic approach in mitigating threats.
title_zh: 从威胁情报到防火墙规则：混合人工智能代理与专家系统架构中的语义关系
abstract_zh: 网络安全部署需要对不断演变的网络威胁具备快速响应能力。代理型人工智能（AI）虽能实现自动化，但确保安全响应的可信性至关重要。本文研究了语义关系在提取敏感操作任务相关信息中的作用，例如配置安全控制以缓解威胁。为此，本文提出利用上下位词（hypernym-hyponym）文本关系，从网络威胁情报（CTI）报告中提取相关信息。通过采用神经符号方法，该多代理系统可自动生成CLIPS代码，用于构建专家系统，以创建防火墙规则来阻断恶意网络流量。实验结果表明，相较于多种基线方法，上下位词检索策略表现出更优性能，且代理型方法在威胁缓解方面具有更高的有效性。

title: In-Context Environments Induce Evaluation-Awareness in Language Models
authors: Maheep Chaudhary
abstract: Humans often become more self-aware under threat, yet can lose self-awareness when absorbed in a task; we hypothesize that language models exhibit environment-dependent \textit{evaluation awareness}. This raises concerns that models could strategically underperform, or \textit{sandbag}, to avoid triggering capability-limiting interventions such as unlearning or shutdown. Prior work demonstrates sandbagging under hand-crafted prompts, but this underestimates the true vulnerability ceiling. We introduce a black-box adversarial optimization framework treating the in-context prompt as an optimizable environment, and develop two approaches to characterize sandbagging: (1) measuring whether models expressing intent to underperform can actually execute it across different task structures, and (2) causally isolating whether underperformance is driven by genuine evaluation-aware reasoning or shallow prompt-following. Evaluating Claude-3.5-Haiku, GPT-4o-mini, and Llama-3.3-70B across four benchmarks (Arithmetic, GSM8K, MMLU, and HumanEval), optimized prompts induce up to 94 percentage point (pp) degradation on arithmetic (GPT-4o-mini: 97.8\%$\rightarrow$4.0\%), far exceeding hand-crafted baselines which produce near-zero behavioral change. Code generation exhibits model-dependent resistance: Claude degrades only 0.6pp, while Llama's accuracy drops to 0\%. The intent -- execution gap reveals a monotonic resistance ordering: Arithmetic $<$ GSM8K $<$ MMLU, demonstrating that vulnerability is governed by task structure rather than prompt strength. CoT causal intervention confirms that 99.3\% of sandbagging is causally driven by verbalized eval-aware reasoning, ruling out shallow instruction-following. These findings demonstrate that adversarially optimized prompts pose a substantially greater threat to evaluation reliability than previously understood.
title_zh: 上下文环境促使语言模型产生评估意识
abstract_zh:
人类在面临威胁时往往变得更加自我觉察，但在全神贯注于任务时却可能丧失自我意识。我们提出假设：语言模型表现出环境依赖的**评估觉察能力**（evaluation awareness）。这一特性引发了担忧：模型可能出于策略性目的故意表现不佳，即“**故意降级**”（sandbagging），以规避能力限制性干预措施，如模型重置或系统关闭。以往研究已证明在人工设计的提示下存在故意降级行为，但这类方法低估了模型真实潜在的脆弱性上限。为此，我们提出一种黑箱对抗优化框架，将上下文提示视为可优化的环境，并发展出两种方法来刻画故意降级现象：（1）衡量模型在表达出故意表现不佳意图后，是否能在不同任务结构下真正实现该行为；（2）通过因果干预手段，区分模型的性能下降是源于真实的评估觉察能力，还是仅仅出于对提示的浅层遵循。

我们在四个基准测试（算术、GSM8K、MMLU 和 HumanEval）上对 Claude-3.5-Haiku、GPT-4o-mini 和 Llama-3.3-70B 进行评估。经优化的提示导致算术任务性能最高下降达 94 个百分点（GPT-4o-mini：97.8% → 4.0%），远超人工设计提示所引发的几乎可忽略的行为变化。在代码生成任务中，不同模型表现出显著差异：Claude 仅下降 0.6 个百分点，而 Llama 的准确率则骤降至 0%。意图与执行之间的差距揭示出一种单调的抗性排序：算术 < GSM8K < MMLU，表明模型的脆弱性主要由任务结构决定，而非提示强度。通过思维链（CoT）因果干预实验进一步证实，99.3% 的故意降级行为可被因果归因于模型明确表达出的评估觉察能力，而非简单的指令遵循。这些发现表明，对抗性优化提示对评估可靠性的威胁程度远超以往认知。

title: T2S-Bench & Structure-of-Thought: Benchmarking and Prompting Comprehensive Text-to-Structure Reasoning
authors: Qinsi Wang, Hancheng Ye, Jinhee Kim, Jinghan Ke, Yifei Wang, Martin Kuo, Zishan Shao, Dongting Li, Yueqian Lin, Ting Jiang, Chiyue Wei, Qi Qian, Wei Wen, Helen Li, Yiran Chen
abstract: Think about how human handles complex reading tasks: marking key points, inferring their relationships, and structuring information to guide understanding and responses. Likewise, can a large language model benefit from text structure to enhance text-processing performance? To explore it, in this work, we first introduce Structure of Thought (SoT), a prompting technique that explicitly guides models to construct intermediate text structures, consistently boosting performance across eight tasks and three model families. Building upon this insight, we present T2S-Bench, the first benchmark designed to evaluate and improve text-to-structure capabilities of models. T2S-Bench includes 1.8K samples across 6 scientific domains and 32 structural types, rigorously constructed to ensure accuracy, fairness, and quality. Evaluation on 45 mainstream models reveals substantial improvement potential: the average accuracy on the multi-hop reasoning task is only 52.1%, and even the most advanced model achieves 58.1% node accuracy in end-to-end extraction. Furthermore, on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, SoT alone yields an average +5.7% improvement across eight diverse text-processing tasks, and fine-tuning on T2S-Bench further increases this gain to +8.6%. These results highlight the value of explicit text structuring and the complementary contributions of SoT and T2S-Bench. Dataset and eval code have been released at https://t2s-bench.github.io/T2S-Bench-Page/.
title_zh: T2S-Bench 与思维结构：全面文本到结构推理的基准测试与提示方法
abstract_zh: 思考人类处理复杂阅读任务的方式：标记关键点、推断其相互关系，并构建信息结构以引导理解与回应。同样，大型语言模型是否也能从文本结构中获益，从而提升文本处理性能？为探究这一问题，本文首先提出“思维结构”（Structure of Thought, SoT）这一提示技术，通过显式引导模型构建中间文本结构，在八个任务和三个模型系列中均持续提升了性能。基于这一发现，我们进一步提出了T2S-Bench——首个专门用于评估和提升模型“文本到结构”能力的基准测试。T2S-Bench涵盖6个科学领域、32种结构类型，共包含1800个精心构建的样本，确保了数据的准确性、公平性与高质量。对45个主流模型的评估显示，模型在该基准上仍有巨大提升空间：多跳推理任务的平均准确率仅为52.1%，即使最先进的模型在端到端结构提取任务中也仅达到58.1%的节点准确率。此外，在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct模型上，仅使用SoT技术便在八项多样化的文本处理任务中实现了平均+5.7%的性能提升，而在T2S-Bench上进行微调后，这一提升进一步增至+8.6%。这些结果凸显了显式文本结构化的重要价值，也证明了SoT与T2S-Bench之间具有互补性贡献。相关数据集与评估代码已发布于 https://t2s-bench.github.io/T2S-Bench-Page/。

title: Can LLM Aid in Solving Constraints with Inductive Definitions?
authors: Weizhi Feng, Shidong Shen, Jiaxiang Liu, Taolue Chen, Fu Song, Zhilin Wu
abstract: Solving constraints involving inductive (aka recursive) definitions is challenging. State-of-the-art SMT/CHC solvers and first-order logic provers provide only limited support for solving such constraints, especially when they involve, e.g., abstract data types. In this work, we leverage structured prompts to elicit Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate auxiliary lemmas that are necessary for reasoning about these inductive definitions. We further propose a neuro-symbolic approach, which synergistically integrates LLMs with constraint solvers: the LLM iteratively generates conjectures, while the solver checks their validity and usefulness for proving the goal. We evaluate our approach on a diverse benchmark suite comprising constraints originating from algebrai data types and recurrence relations. The experimental results show that our approach can improve the state-of-the-art SMT and CHC solvers, solving considerably more (around 25%) proof tasks involving inductive definitions, demonstrating its efficacy.
title_zh: 大语言模型能否帮助解决具有归纳定义的约束问题？
abstract_zh: 涉及归纳（即递归）定义的约束求解具有挑战性。当前最先进的SMT/CHC求解器以及一阶逻辑定理证明器对这类约束的支持非常有限，尤其是在涉及抽象数据类型等情形时。本文中，我们利用结构化提示（structured prompts）引导大型语言模型（LLMs）生成推理归纳定义所必需的辅助引理。此外，我们提出了一种神经符号方法，将LLM与约束求解器进行协同集成：LLM迭代生成假设，而求解器则验证这些假设的有效性及其对证明目标的助益性。我们在一个多样化的基准测试套件上评估了该方法，该套件包含来自代数数据类型和递推关系的约束。实验结果表明，我们的方法能够显著提升现有SMT和CHC求解器的性能，使涉及归纳定义的证明任务求解率提高约25%，充分证明了该方法的有效性。

title: ORION: Intent-Aware Orchestration in Open RAN for SLA-Driven Network Management
authors: Gabriela da Silva Machado, Gustavo Z. Bruno, Alexandre Huff, Jose Marcos Camara Brito, Cristiano B. Both
abstract: The disaggregation of the Radio Access Network (RAN) introduces unprecedented flexibility but significant operational complexity, necessitating automated management frameworks. However, current Open RAN (O-RAN) orchestration relies on fragmented manual policies, lacking end-to-end intent assurance from high-level requirements to low-level configurations. In this paper, we propose ORION, an O-RAN compliant intent orchestration framework that integrates Large Language Models (LLMs) via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to translate natural language intents into enforceable network policies. ORION leverages a hierarchical agent architecture, combining an MCP-based Service Management and Orchestration (SMO) layer for semantic translation with a Non-Real-Time RIC rApp and Near-Real-Time RIC xApp for closed-loop enforcement. Extensive evaluations using GPT-5, Gemini 3 Pro, and Claude Opus demonstrate a 100% policy generation success rate for high-capacity models, highlighting significant trade-offs in reasoning efficiency. We show that ORION reduces provisioning complexity by automating the complete intent lifecycle, from ingestion to E2-level enforcement, paving the way for autonomous 6G networks.
title_zh: ORION：面向意图的开放无线接入网编排以实现服务等级协议驱动的网络管理
abstract_zh: 无线接入网（RAN）的解耦带来了前所未有的灵活性，但也引入了显著的运营复杂性，亟需自动化管理框架。然而，当前基于开放无线接入网（O-RAN）的编排依赖于零散的手动策略，缺乏从高层需求到底层配置的端到端意图保障。本文提出ORION，一个符合O-RAN标准的意图编排框架，通过模型上下文协议（MCP）集成大型语言模型（LLMs），将自然语言意图转化为可执行的网络策略。ORION采用分层智能体架构，结合基于MCP的服务管理与编排（SMO）层实现语义翻译，并利用非实时RAN智能控制器（RIC）rApp与近实时RIC xApp实现闭环执行。通过GPT-5、Gemini 3 Pro和Claude Opus的大量评估表明，对于高容量模型，策略生成的成功率达到100%，同时揭示了推理效率方面的显著权衡。实验结果表明，ORION通过自动化完成从意图接收至E2级执行的完整生命周期，显著降低了配置复杂性，为实现自主可控的6G网络铺平了道路。

title: A Dual-Helix Governance Approach Towards Reliable Agentic AI for WebGIS Development
authors: Boyuan, Guan, Wencong Cui, Levente Juhasz
abstract: WebGIS development requires rigor, yet agentic AI frequently fails due to five large language model (LLM) limitations: context constraints, cross-session forgetting, stochasticity, instruction failure, and adaptation rigidity. We propose a dual-helix governance framework reframing these challenges as structural governance problems that model capacity alone cannot resolve. We implement the framework as a 3-track architecture (Knowledge, Behavior, Skills) that uses a knowledge graph substrate to stabilize execution by externalizing domain facts and enforcing executable protocols, complemented by a self-learning cycle for autonomous knowledge growth. Applying this to the FutureShorelines WebGIS tool, a governed agent refactored a 2,265-line monolithic codebase into modular ES6 components. Results demonstrated a 51\% reduction in cyclomatic complexity and a 7-point increase in maintainability index. A comparative experiment against a zero-shot LLM confirms that externalized governance, not just model capability, drives operational reliability in geospatial engineering. This approach is implemented in the open-source AgentLoom governance toolkit.
title_zh: 面向WebGIS开发的可靠智能体AI双螺旋治理方法
abstract_zh: WebGIS开发需要严谨性，但代理型AI常因五大语言模型（LLM）的局限而失效：上下文限制、跨会话遗忘、随机性、指令失败以及适应僵化。我们提出一种双螺旋治理框架，将这些挑战重新定义为仅靠模型能力无法解决的结构性治理问题。该框架被实现为三轨架构（知识、行为、技能），以知识图谱为底层支撑，通过外部化领域事实并强制执行可执行协议来稳定系统运行，同时辅以自学习循环，实现自主知识增长。将其应用于FutureShorelines WebGIS工具时，经治理的智能体成功将2,265行的单体代码重构为模块化的ES6组件。结果表明，圈复杂度降低了51%，可维护性指数提升了7分。与零样本LLM的对比实验进一步证实，推动地理空间工程中操作可靠性的关键在于外部化治理机制，而非单纯依赖模型能力。该方法已集成至开源的AgentLoom治理工具包中。

title: Position: Vector Prompt Interfaces Should Be Exposed to Enable Customization of Large Language Models
authors: Liangwei Yang, Shiyu Wang, Haolin Chen, Rithesh Murthy, Ming Zhu, Jielin Qiu, Zixiang Chen, Juntao Tan, Jianguo Zhang, Zhiwei Liu, Wenting Zhao, Silvio Savarese, Caiming Xiong, Huan Wang, Shelby Heinecke
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) transition from research prototypes to real-world systems, customization has emerged as a central bottleneck. While text prompts can already customize LLM behavior, we argue that text-only prompting does not constitute a suitable control interface for scalable, stable, and inference-only customization. This position paper argues that model providers should expose \emph{vector prompt inputs} as part of the public interface for customizing LLMs. We support this position with diagnostic evidence showing that vector prompt tuning continues to improve with increasing supervision whereas text-based prompt optimization saturates early, and that vector prompts exhibit dense, global attention patterns indicative of a distinct control mechanism. We further discuss why inference-only customization is increasingly important under realistic deployment constraints, and why exposing vector prompts need not fundamentally increase model leakage risk under a standard black-box threat model. We conclude with a call to action for the community to rethink prompt interfaces as a core component of LLM customization.
title_zh: 位置：应公开向量提示接口，以实现对大型语言模型的定制化
abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）从研究原型逐步走向真实世界系统，定制化已成为一个核心瓶颈。尽管文本提示（text prompts）目前已可用于调整LLM的行为，但我们认为，仅依赖文本提示并不能构成一种适用于可扩展、稳定且仅限推理阶段的定制化控制接口。本文提出，模型提供方应将**向量提示输入**（vector prompt inputs）作为公开接口的一部分，以支持LLM的定制化。我们通过诊断性证据支持这一观点：与文本提示优化在早期即趋于饱和不同，向量提示调优在获得更多监督信号时仍能持续提升性能；同时，向量提示展现出密集且全局的注意力模式，表明其背后存在一种独特的控制机制。此外，我们进一步探讨了在现实部署约束下，仅限推理阶段定制化的重要性，以及在标准黑盒威胁模型下，暴露向量提示并不会显著增加模型泄露风险。最后，本文呼吁学术界重新思考提示接口，将其视为LLM定制化的核心组成部分。

title: Memex(RL): Scaling Long-Horizon LLM Agents via Indexed Experience Memory
authors: Zhenting Wang, Huancheng Chen, Jiayun Wang, Wei Wei
abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are fundamentally bottlenecked by finite context windows on long-horizon tasks. As trajectories grow, retaining tool outputs and intermediate reasoning in-context quickly becomes infeasible: the working context becomes prohibitively long, eventually exceeds the context budget, and makes distant evidence harder to use even when it is still present. Existing solutions typically shorten context through truncation or running summaries, but these methods are fundamentally lossy because they compress or discard past evidence itself. We introduce Memex, an indexed experience memory mechanism that instead compresses context without discarding evidence. Memex maintains a compact working context consisting of concise structured summaries and stable indices, while storing full-fidelity underlying interactions in an external experience database under those indices. The agent can then decide when to dereference an index and recover the exact past evidence needed for the current subgoal. We optimize both write and read behaviors with our reinforcement learning framework MemexRL, using reward shaping tailored to indexed memory usage under a context budget, so the agent learns what to summarize, what to archive, how to index it, and when to retrieve it. This yields a substantially less lossy form of long-horizon memory than summary-only approaches. We further provide a theoretical analysis showing the potential of the Memex loop to preserve decision quality with bounded dereferencing while keeping effective in-context computation bounded as history grows. Empirically, on challenging long-horizon tasks, Memex agent trained with MemexRL improves task success while using a significantly smaller working context.
title_zh: Memex(RL)：通过索引经验记忆实现长时程大语言模型智能体的扩展
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）代理在处理长时程任务时，其性能本质上受限于有限的上下文窗口。随着任务轨迹的不断延伸，将工具输出和中间推理过程保留在上下文中变得迅速不可行：工作上下文变得过于冗长，最终超出上下文预算，即使远距离的证据仍然存在，也难以有效利用。现有的解决方案通常通过截断或运行摘要来缩短上下文，但这些方法本质上是信息有损的，因为它们会压缩或丢弃过去的证据本身。我们提出了Memex——一种基于索引的经验记忆机制，该机制通过压缩上下文而不丢弃证据来实现更高效的管理。Memex维护一个紧凑的工作上下文，其中包含简洁的结构化摘要和稳定的索引，同时将完整的原始交互数据以这些索引为标识存储在外部经验数据库中。代理可以根据需要决定何时解引用某个索引，从而精确恢复当前子目标所需的过去证据。我们通过名为MemexRL的强化学习框架，对写入和读取行为进行优化，采用针对上下文预算下索引记忆使用的奖励塑形策略，使代理学会何时进行摘要、何时归档、如何建立索引，以及何时检索信息。这相比仅依赖摘要的方法，显著降低了长时程记忆的信息损失。此外，我们还提供了理论分析，证明Memex循环在有限解引用次数的前提下，能够保持决策质量，并在历史数据不断增长的情况下，仍能将有效上下文计算量控制在合理范围内。实证结果表明，在具有挑战性的长时程任务中，使用MemexRL训练的Memex代理在显著减小工作上下文的同时，显著提升了任务成功率。

title: CAM-LDS: Cyber Attack Manifestations for Automatic Interpretation of System Logs and Security Alerts
authors: Max Landauer, Wolfgang Hotwagner, Thorina Boenke, Florian Skopik, Markus Wurzenberger
abstract: Log data are essential for intrusion detection and forensic investigations. However, manual log analysis is tedious due to high data volumes, heterogeneous event formats, and unstructured messages. Even though many automated methods for log analysis exist, they usually still rely on domain-specific configurations such as expert-defined detection rules, handcrafted log parsers, or manual feature-engineering. Crucially, the level of automation of conventional methods is limited due to their inability to semantically understand logs and explain their underlying causes. In contrast, Large Language Models enable domain- and format-agnostic interpretation of system logs and security alerts. Unfortunately, research on this topic remains challenging, because publicly available and labeled data sets covering a broad range of attack techniques are scarce. To address this gap, we introduce the Cyber Attack Manifestation Log Data Set (CAM-LDS), comprising seven attack scenarios that cover 81 distinct techniques across 13 tactics and collected from 18 distinct sources within a fully open-source and reproducible test environment. We extract log events that directly result from attack executions to facilitate analysis of manifestations concerning command observability, event frequencies, performance metrics, and intrusion detection alerts. We further present an illustrative case study utilizing an LLM to process the CAM-LDS. The results indicate that correct attack techniques are predicted perfectly for approximately one third of attack steps and adequately for another third, highlighting the potential of LLM-based log interpretation and utility of our data set.
title_zh: CAM-LDS：用于系统日志和安全告警自动解读的网络攻击表现
abstract_zh: 日志数据对于入侵检测和取证调查至关重要。然而，由于数据量庞大、事件格式异构以及日志消息非结构化，手动分析日志既繁琐又耗时。尽管目前已存在多种自动化的日志分析方法，但它们通常仍依赖于特定领域的配置，例如专家定义的检测规则、手工设计的日志解析器或人工特征工程。关键问题是，传统方法的自动化程度受限，因为它们无法语义化地理解日志，也无法解释其背后的根本原因。相比之下，大型语言模型（LLM）能够实现领域和格式无关的日志与安全告警解读。然而，该领域的研究仍面临挑战，因为涵盖广泛攻击技术的公开、标注数据集极为稀缺。为填补这一空白，我们提出了“网络攻击表现日志数据集”（Cyber Attack Manifestation Log Data Set, CAM-LDS），该数据集包含七个攻击场景，覆盖13个战术下的81种不同攻击技术，并从18个不同的数据源收集，所有实验均在完全开源且可复现的测试环境中完成。我们提取了直接由攻击执行引发的日志事件，以支持对命令可观测性、事件频率、性能指标以及入侵检测告警等攻击表现特征的分析。此外，我们还展示了一个利用LLM处理CAM-LDS的案例研究。结果表明，约三分之一的攻击步骤中，LLM能够完美预测出正确的攻击技术，另有三分之一的步骤预测结果达到合理水平，充分展示了基于LLM的日志解读潜力以及本数据集的实用价值。

title: BeamPERL: Parameter-Efficient RL with Verifiable Rewards Specializes Compact LLMs for Structured Beam Mechanics Reasoning
authors: Tarjei Paule Hage, Markus J. Buehler
abstract: Can reinforcement learning with hard, verifiable rewards teach a compact language model to reason about physics, or does it primarily learn to pattern-match toward correct answers? We study this question by training a 1.5B-parameter reasoning model on beam statics, a classic engineering problem, using parameter-efficient RLVR with binary correctness rewards from symbolic solvers, without teacher-generated reasoning traces. The best BeamPERL checkpoint achieves a 66.7% improvement in Pass@1 over the base model. However, the learned competence is anisotropic: the model generalizes compositionally (more loads) but fails under topological shifts (moved supports) that require the same equilibrium equations. Intermediate checkpoints yield the strongest reasoning, while continued optimization degrades robustness while maintaining reward. These findings reveal a key limitation of outcome-level alignment: reinforcement learning with exact physics rewards induces procedural solution templates rather than internalization of governing equations. The precision of the reward signal - even when analytically exact - does not by itself guarantee transferable physical reasoning. Our results suggest that verifiable rewards may need to be paired with structured reasoning scaffolding to move beyond template matching toward robust scientific reasoning.
title_zh: BeamPERL：具有可验证奖励的参数高效强化学习，专用于结构化束力学推理的紧凑型大语言模型
abstract_zh: 使用硬性、可验证的奖励进行强化学习，能否教会一个紧凑的语言模型进行物理推理，还是它主要学会对正确答案进行模式匹配？我们通过在经典工程问题——梁的静力学——上训练一个15亿参数的推理模型来研究这一问题，采用参数高效的RLVR方法，使用符号求解器提供的二元正确性奖励，且无需教师生成的推理轨迹。最佳的BeamPERL检查点在Pass@1指标上相比基础模型提升了66.7%。然而，模型所习得的能力具有方向性：它能够进行组合式泛化（如增加载荷），但在拓扑结构变化（如支撑点移动）的情况下失败，而这类情况所需的平衡方程与原问题完全相同。中间检查点展现出最强的推理能力，而持续优化反而导致鲁棒性下降，尽管奖励得分仍保持较高水平。这些发现揭示了结果层面对齐的一个关键局限：即使使用精确的物理奖励，强化学习也倾向于诱导出程序性解题模板，而非内化基本的物理方程。奖励信号的精确性——即使在数学上完全准确——本身并不能保证可迁移的物理推理能力。我们的结果表明，可验证的奖励可能需要与结构化的推理支架相结合，才能超越模板匹配，实现稳健的科学推理。

title: Lambdas at the Far Edge: a Tale of Flying Lambdas and Lambdas on Wheels
authors: Giorgio Audrito, Daniele Bortoluzzi, Ferruccio Damiani, Giordano Scarso, Gianluca Torta, Andrea Basso, Monica Cochi, Lorenzo Gusman, Lorenzo Comba, Paolo Gay, Paola Dal Zovo, Giada Galati, Francesco Gallo, Aljaž Grdadolnik, Massimo Pescarollo, Paola Pisano
abstract: Aggregate Programming (AP) is a paradigm for programming the collective behaviour of sets of distributed devices, possibly situated at the network far edge, by relying on asynchronous proximity-based interactions. The eXchange Calculus (XC), a recently proposed foundational model for AP, is essentially a typed lambda calculus extended with an operator (the exchange operator) providing an implicit communication mechanism between neighbour devices. This paper provides a gentle introduction to XC and to its implementation as a C++ library, called FCPP. The FCPP library and toolchain has been mainly developed at the Department of Computer Science of the University of Turin, where Stefano Berardi spent most of his academic career conducting outstanding research about logical foundation of computer science and transmitting his passion for research to students and young researchers, often exploiting typed lambda calculi. An FCCP program is essentially a typed lambda term, and FCPP has been used to write code that has been deployed on devices at the far edge of the network, including rovers and (soon) Uncrewed Aerial Vehicles (UAVs); hence the title of the paper.
title_zh: 远端的lambda：一个关于飞翔的lambda与轮上lambda的故事
abstract_zh: 聚合编程（Aggregate Programming, AP）是一种用于编程分布式设备集合集体行为的范式，这些设备可能位于网络的远端边缘，通过依赖异步的邻近交互来实现。最近提出的AP基础模型——交换演算（eXchange Calculus, XC），本质上是一种带有交换算子（exchange operator）的类型化λ演算，该算子为邻近设备之间提供了隐式的通信机制。本文旨在对XC进行温和而深入的介绍，并阐述其作为C++库的实现——FCPP。FCPP库及其工具链主要由都灵大学计算机科学系开发，而斯特凡诺·贝拉迪（Stefano Berardi）在其整个学术生涯中长期在此从事计算机科学逻辑基础的杰出研究，并热忱地将科研精神传递给学生和年轻研究者，常借助类型化λ演算作为研究工具。在FCPP中，一个程序本质上是一个类型化的λ项，而FCPP已被用于编写部署在远离网络中心的设备上的代码，包括火星探测车以及即将部署的无人飞行器（UAVs）；因此，本文的标题也由此而来。

title: OMNIINTENT: A Trusted Intent-Centric Framework for User-Friendly Web3
authors: Zhuoran Pan, Yue Li, Zhi Guan, Jianbin Hu, Zhong Chen
abstract: The increasingly complex Web3 ecosystem and decentralized finance (DeFi) landscape demand ever higher levels of technical expertise and financial literacy from participants. The Intent-Centric paradigm in DeFi has thus emerged in response, which allows users to focus on their trading intents rather than the underlying execution details. However, existing approaches, including Typed-intent design and LLM-driven solver, trade off expressiveness, trust, privacy, and composability. We present OMNIINTENT, a language-runtime co-design that reconciles these requirements. OMNIINTENT introduces ICL, a domain-specific Intent-Centric Language for precise yet flexible specification of triggers, actions, and runtime constraints; a Trusted Execution Environment (TEE)-based compiler that compiles intents into signed, state-bound transactions inside an enclave; and an execution optimizer that constructs transaction dependency graphs for safe parallel batch submission and a mempool-aware feasibility checker that predicts execution outcomes. Our full-stack prototype processes diverse DeFi scenarios, achieving 89.6% intent coverage, up to 7.3x throughput speedup via parallel execution, and feasibility-prediction accuracy up to 99.2% with low latency.
title_zh: OMNIINTENT：一种可信的以意图为中心的Web3用户友好框架
abstract_zh: 日益复杂的Web3生态系统与去中心化金融（DeFi）格局，对参与者提出了越来越高的技术专业能力和金融素养要求。为此，以“意图为中心”（Intent-Centric）的范式应运而生，使用户能够专注于表达交易意图，而无需关注底层执行细节。然而，现有的方法，包括类型化意图设计（Typed-intent design）和基于大语言模型（LLM）的求解器，往往在表达能力、信任机制、隐私保护与可组合性之间存在权衡。本文提出OMNIINTENT，一种语言与运行时协同设计的解决方案，有效调和了这些相互冲突的需求。OMNIINTENT引入了ICL——一种领域专用的“意图中心”语言，用于精确且灵活地定义触发条件、操作行为及运行时约束；一个基于可信执行环境（TEE）的编译器，可在安全飞地（enclave）内将意图编译为带签名、状态绑定的交易；以及一个执行优化器，通过构建交易依赖图实现安全的并行批量提交，同时配备一个感知内存池（mempool-aware）的可行性检查器，可准确预测执行结果。我们构建的全栈原型能够处理多样化的DeFi场景，实现了89.6%的意图覆盖率，通过并行执行最高获得7.3倍的吞吐量提升，可行性预测准确率高达99.2%，且延迟极低。

title: CodeTaste: Can LLMs Generate Human-Level Code Refactorings?
authors: Alex Thillen, Niels Mündler, Veselin Raychev, Martin Vechev
abstract: Large language model (LLM) coding agents can generate working code, but their solutions often accumulate complexity, duplication, and architectural debt. Human developers address such issues through refactoring: behavior-preserving program transformations that improve structure and maintainability. In this paper, we investigate if LLM agents (i) can execute refactorings reliably and (ii) identify the refactorings that human developers actually chose in real codebases. We present CodeTaste, a benchmark of refactoring tasks mined from large-scale multi-file changes in open-source repositories. To score solutions, we combine repository test suites with custom static checks that verify removal of undesired patterns and introduction of desired patterns using dataflow reasoning. Our experimental results indicate a clear gap across frontier models: agents perform well when refactorings are specified in detail, but often fail to discover the human refactoring choices when only presented with a focus area for improvement. A propose-then-implement decomposition improves alignment, and selecting the best-aligned proposal before implementation can yield further gains. CodeTaste provides an evaluation target and a potential preference signal for aligning coding agents with human refactoring decisions in realistic codebases.
title_zh: CodeTaste：大语言模型能否生成人类水平的代码重构？
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）编程代理能够生成可运行的代码，但其解决方案往往累积了复杂性、重复代码和架构债务。人类开发者通过重构来解决这些问题：即在不改变程序行为的前提下，对代码结构进行优化以提升可维护性。本文研究了LLM代理（i）是否能够可靠地执行重构操作，以及（ii）能否识别出人类开发者在真实代码库中实际选择的重构方式。我们提出了CodeTaste，一个从开源仓库中大规模多文件变更记录中挖掘出的重构任务基准数据集。为评估解决方案，我们结合代码库的测试套件与定制的静态检查机制，利用数据流分析验证是否成功移除了不良模式并引入了期望的模式。实验结果表明，前沿模型之间存在明显差距：当重构操作被详细指定时，代理表现良好；但当仅提供需要改进的关注区域时，它们往往无法发现人类开发者实际选择的重构方式。我们提出的“先提出再实现”（propose-then-implement）分解策略能显著提升对齐度，而在实施前选择最匹配的提案还能带来进一步的性能提升。CodeTaste为评估编程代理在真实代码库中与人类重构决策的一致性提供了基准目标，并可能作为对齐优化的潜在偏好信号。

title: SWE-CI: Evaluating Agent Capabilities in Maintaining Codebases via Continuous Integration
authors: Jialong Chen, Xander Xu, Hu Wei, Chuan Chen, Bing Zhao
abstract: Large language model (LLM)-powered agents have demonstrated strong capabilities in automating software engineering tasks such as static bug fixing, as evidenced by benchmarks like SWE-bench. However, in the real world, the development of mature software is typically predicated on complex requirement changes and long-term feature iterations -- a process that static, one-shot repair paradigms fail to capture. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{SWE-CI}, the first repository-level benchmark built upon the Continuous Integration loop, aiming to shift the evaluation paradigm for code generation from static, short-term \textit{functional correctness} toward dynamic, long-term \textit{maintainability}. The benchmark comprises 100 tasks, each corresponding on average to an evolution history spanning 233 days and 71 consecutive commits in a real-world code repository. SWE-CI requires agents to systematically resolve these tasks through dozens of rounds of analysis and coding iterations. SWE-CI provides valuable insights into how well agents can sustain code quality throughout long-term evolution.
title_zh: SWE-CI：通过持续集成评估代理在维护代码库方面的能力
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体在自动化软件工程任务方面已展现出强大能力，例如静态缺陷修复，这在SWE-bench等基准测试中得到了验证。然而，在现实世界中，成熟软件的开发通常依赖于复杂的需求变更和长期的功能迭代——这一过程远非静态的一次性修复范式所能涵盖。为弥合这一差距，我们提出了**SWE-CI**，这是首个基于持续集成（Continuous Integration）循环构建的仓库级基准测试，旨在推动代码生成评估范式从静态、短期的**功能正确性**，转向动态、长期的**可维护性**。该基准包含100个任务，每个任务平均对应一个真实代码仓库中历时233天、包含71次连续提交的演化历史。SWE-CI要求智能体通过数十轮的分析与编码迭代，系统性地完成这些任务。该基准为评估智能体在长期演化过程中维持代码质量的能力提供了宝贵洞见。

title: Specification-Driven Generation and Evaluation of Discrete-Event World Models via the DEVS Formalism
authors: Zheyu Chen, Zhuohuan Li, Chuanhao Li
abstract: World models are essential for planning and evaluation in agentic systems, yet existing approaches lie at two extremes: hand-engineered simulators that offer consistency and reproducibility but are costly to adapt, and implicit neural models that are flexible but difficult to constrain, verify, and debug over long horizons. We seek a principled middle ground that combines the reliability of explicit simulators with the flexibility of learned models, allowing world models to be adapted during online execution. By targeting a broad class of environments whose dynamics are governed by the ordering, timing, and causality of discrete events, such as queueing and service operations, embodied task planning, and message-mediated multi-agent coordination, we advocate explicit, executable discrete-event world models synthesized directly from natural-language specifications. Our approach adopts the DEVS formalism and introduces a staged LLM-based generation pipeline that separates structural inference of component interactions from component-level event and timing logic. To evaluate generated models without a unique ground truth, simulators emit structured event traces that are validated against specification-derived temporal and semantic constraints, enabling reproducible verification and localized diagnostics. Together, these contributions produce world models that are consistent over long-horizon rollouts, verifiable from observable behavior, and efficient to synthesize on demand during online execution.
title_zh: 基于DEVS形式化方法的规范驱动的离散事件世界模型生成与评估
abstract_zh: 世界模型在智能体系统中的规划与评估中至关重要，然而现有方法处于两个极端：手工设计的模拟器虽然具备一致性与可复现性，但适应成本高昂；而隐式神经模型虽灵活，却难以在长时程中进行约束、验证与调试。我们致力于寻找一种原则性的中间路径，将显式模拟器的可靠性与学习模型的灵活性相结合，使世界模型能够在在线执行过程中实现动态适应。针对一类由离散事件的顺序、时机与因果关系所支配的广泛环境——如排队与服务操作、具身任务规划以及基于消息传递的多智能体协同——我们主张直接从自然语言规范中合成显式、可执行的离散事件世界模型。我们的方法采用DEVS形式化框架，并引入分阶段的基于大语言模型（LLM）的生成流程，将组件间相互作用的结构推断与组件级事件与时间逻辑的建模相分离。为在缺乏唯一真实标签的情况下评估生成的模型，模拟器会输出结构化的事件轨迹，并依据规范推导出的时间与语义约束进行验证，从而实现可复现的验证与局部化诊断。综上，这些贡献共同实现了在长时程推演中保持一致、可从可观测行为验证、且可在在线执行过程中按需高效合成的世界模型。

title: MACC: Multi-Agent Collaborative Competition for Scientific Exploration
authors: Satoshi Oyama, Yuko Sakurai, Hisashi Kashima
abstract: Scientific discovery still relies heavily on the manual efforts of individual researchers, leading to limited exploration, redundant trials, and reduced reproducibility. Human-participant data analysis competitions generate diverse approaches, yet fluctuations in participation and the lack of independent repetitions show that parallel exploration alone is insufficient for achieving reliable scientific inquiry. As advanced AI agents based on large language models (LLMs) increasingly perform analytical tasks, relying on a single highly capable agent is unlikely to overcome these structural limitations. Recent work has begun to explore how multiple LLM-based agents can collaborate or compete in scientific workflows-a growing trend we refer to as MA4Science. However, most existing MA4Science studies assume that all agents are controlled by a single organizational entity, limiting their ability to examine how institutional mechanisms-such as incentives, information sharing, and reproducibility-shape collective exploration among independently managed agents. To address this gap, we introduce MACC (Multi-Agent Collaborative Competition), an institutional architecture that integrates a blackboard-style shared scientific workspace with incentive mechanisms designed to encourage transparency, reproducibility, and exploration efficiency. MACC provides a testbed for studying how institutional design influences scalable and reliable multi-agent scientific exploration.
title_zh: MACC：多智能体协作竞赛，用于科学探索
abstract_zh: 科学发现仍然严重依赖个体研究人员的手动努力，导致探索范围有限、重复试验频发，以及可重复性降低。人类参与的数据分析竞赛虽然催生了多样化的研究方法，但参与度的波动以及缺乏独立重复实验表明，仅靠并行探索无法实现可靠的科学探究。随着基于大语言模型（LLMs）的先进AI代理越来越多地承担分析任务，仅依赖单一高度智能的代理也难以克服这些结构性局限。近期研究开始探索多个基于LLM的代理如何在科学工作流中协作或竞争——这一日益增长的趋势我们称之为MA4Science。然而，大多数现有的MA4Science研究假设所有代理均由单一组织实体控制，这限制了其在独立管理的代理之间，探讨制度机制（如激励机制、信息共享和可重复性）如何影响集体探索能力的能力。为弥补这一空白，我们提出了MACC（多代理协作竞争）架构，该架构结合了类似黑板的共享科学工作空间与激励机制，旨在促进透明性、可重复性和探索效率。MACC为研究制度设计如何影响可扩展且可靠的多代理科学探索提供了实验平台。

title: Confidence-Calibrated Small-Large Language Model Collaboration for Cost-Efficient Reasoning
authors: Chuang Zhang, Zizhen Zhu, Yihao Wei, Bing Tian, Junyi Liu, Henan Wang, Xavier Wang, Yaxiao Liu
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate superior reasoning capabilities compared to small language models (SLMs), but incur substantially higher costs. We propose COllaborative REAsoner (COREA), a system that cascades an SLM with an LLM to achieve a balance between accuracy and cost in complex reasoning tasks. COREA first attempts to answer questions using the SLM, which outputs both an answer and a verbalized confidence score. Questions with confidence below a predefined threshold are deferred to the LLM for more accurate resolution. We introduce a reinforcement learning-based training algorithm that aligns the SLM's confidence through an additional confidence calibration reward. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method jointly improves the SLM's reasoning ability and confidence calibration across diverse datasets and model backbones. Compared to using the LLM alone, COREA reduces cost by 21.5% and 16.8% on out-of-domain math and non-math datasets, respectively, with only an absolute pass@1 drop within 2%.
title_zh: 自信校准的小型-大型语言模型协作实现高效推理
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）相较于小型语言模型（SLMs）展现出更优越的推理能力，但其成本也显著更高。我们提出了COllaborative REAsoner（COREA）系统，通过将小型语言模型与大型语言模型级联，实现在复杂推理任务中准确率与成本之间的平衡。COREA首先使用SLM尝试回答问题，输出答案及一个可解释的置信度评分。对于置信度低于预设阈值的问题，系统将其移交至LLM进行更精确的处理。我们引入了一种基于强化学习的训练算法，通过额外的置信度校准奖励来优化SLM的置信度预测。大量实验表明，该方法在多种数据集和模型架构上同时提升了SLM的推理能力与置信度校准性能。与单独使用LLM相比，COREA在跨领域数学和非数学数据集上分别实现了21.5%和16.8%的成本降低，且准确率（pass@1）仅下降了不到2个百分点。

title: Inline Visualization and Manipulation of Real-Time Hardware Log for Supporting Debugging of Embedded Programs
authors: Andrea Bianchi, Zhi Lin Yap, Punn Lertjaturaphat, Austin Z. Henley, Kongpyung Justin Moon, Yoonji Kim
abstract: The development of user-friendly embedded prototyping systems like Arduino has made creating interactive devices more accessible. However, debugging these systems is challenging due to the intertwined nature of software and hardware issues. Existing tools often require hardware instrumentation or log visualization through serial monitors. To address this, the authors designed Inline, a programming tool that simplifies debugging by displaying hardware logs directly within the code, providing real-time execution flow tracking and an expression language for log manipulation. A study with twelve users demonstrated the tool's effectiveness in aiding debugging tasks.
title_zh: 用于支持嵌入式程序调试的实时硬件日志的内联可视化与操作
abstract_zh: 像Arduino这样用户友好的嵌入式原型系统的发展，使得创建交互式设备变得更加容易。然而，由于软件与硬件问题相互交织，调试这些系统仍然具有挑战性。现有的工具通常需要硬件仪器或通过串行监视器进行日志可视化。为了解决这一问题，作者设计了Inline这一编程工具，它通过将硬件日志直接显示在代码中，简化了调试过程，提供了实时执行流程跟踪功能，并支持一种表达式语言用于日志操作。一项针对十二名用户的实验表明，该工具在辅助调试任务方面具有显著效果。

title: CarbonPATH: Carbon-aware pathfinding and architecture optimization for chiplet-based AI systems
authors: Chetan Choppali Sudarshan, Jiajun Hu, Aman Arora, Vidya A. Chhabria
abstract: The exponential growth of AI has created unprecedented demand for computational resources, pushing chip designs to the limit while simultaneously escalating the environmental footprint of computing. As the industry transitions toward heterogeneous integration (HI) to address the yield and cost challenges of monolithic scaling, minimizing the carbon cost of these complex HI systems becomes critical. To fully exploit HI, a co-design approach spanning application, architecture, chip, and packaging is essential. However, this creates a vast design space with competing objectives, specifically the trade-offs between performance, cost, and carbon footprint (CFP) for sustainability. CarbonPATH is an early-stage pathfinding framework designed to address this multi-objective challenge. It identifies optimized HI systems by co-designing workload mapping, architectural parameters, and packaging technologies, while treating sustainability as a first-class design constraint. The framework accounts for a wide range of factors, including compute and memory sizes, chiplet technology nodes, communication protocols, integration style (2D, 2.5D, 3D), operational CFP, embodied CFP, and interconnect type. Using simulated annealing, CarbonPATH explores this high-dimensional space to identify solutions that balance traditional metrics against environmental impact. By capturing interactions across applications, architectures, chiplets, and packaging, CarbonPATH uncovers system-level solutions that traditional methods often miss due to restrictive assumptions or limited scope.
title_zh: CarbonPATH：面向基于Chiplet的AI系统的碳感知路径规划与架构优化
abstract_zh: 人工智能的指数级增长带来了对计算资源前所未有的需求，这在推动芯片设计极限的同时，也显著加剧了计算领域的环境足迹。随着产业转向异构集成（HI）以应对单片扩展在良率和成本方面的挑战，降低这些复杂HI系统的碳成本变得至关重要。要充分发挥HI的潜力，必须采用涵盖应用、架构、芯片和封装的协同设计方法。然而，这带来了庞大且目标相互冲突的设计空间，尤其是在性能、成本与碳足迹（CFP）之间存在显著权衡，以实现可持续发展。CarbonPATH是一种早期阶段的路径探索框架，旨在应对这一多目标挑战。该框架通过协同设计工作负载映射、架构参数和封装技术，识别出优化的HI系统，并将可持续性作为首要设计约束。该框架综合考虑了多种因素，包括计算与内存规模、小芯片技术节点、通信协议、集成方式（2D、2.5D、3D）、运行阶段碳足迹、隐含碳足迹以及互连类型。利用模拟退火算法，CarbonPATH在高维空间中进行探索，以找到在传统指标与环境影响之间取得平衡的解决方案。通过捕捉应用、架构、小芯片与封装之间的相互作用，CarbonPATH能够发现传统方法因假设受限或范围狭窄而常常忽略的系统级优化方案。

title: Agentics 2.0: Logical Transduction Algebra for Agentic Data Workflows
authors: Alfio Massimiliano Gliozzo, Junkyu Lee, Nahuel Defosse
abstract: Agentic AI is rapidly transitioning from research prototypes to enterprise deployments, where requirements extend to meet the software quality attributes of reliability, scalability, and observability beyond plausible text generation. We present Agentics 2.0, a lightweight, Python-native framework for building high-quality, structured, explainable, and type-safe agentic data workflows. At the core of Agentics 2.0, the logical transduction algebra formalizes a large language model inference call as a typed semantic transformation, which we call a transducible function that enforces schema validity and the locality of evidence. The transducible functions compose into larger programs via algebraically grounded operators and execute as stateless asynchronous calls in parallel in asynchronous Map-Reduce programs. The proposed framework provides semantic reliability through strong typing, semantic observability through evidence tracing between slots of the input and output types, and scalability through stateless parallel execution. We instantiate reusable design patterns and evaluate the programs in Agentics 2.0 on challenging benchmarks, including DiscoveryBench for data-driven discovery and Archer for NL-to-SQL semantic parsing, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance.
title_zh: 代理学2.0：代理数据工作流的逻辑转导代数
abstract_zh: 代理型人工智能正迅速从研究原型转向企业级部署，其需求已超越单纯的文本生成能力，扩展至可靠性、可扩展性和可观测性等软件质量属性。我们提出 Agentics 2.0——一个轻量级、原生支持 Python 的框架，用于构建高质量、结构化、可解释且类型安全的代理型数据工作流。Agentics 2.0 的核心是逻辑转换代数，它将大语言模型的推理调用形式化为一种类型化的语义转换，我们称之为“可转换函数”（transducible function），该函数强制保证模式有效性以及证据的局部性。这些可转换函数通过基于代数的运算符组合成更大的程序，并在异步 Map-Reduce 程序中以无状态的异步调用方式并行执行。所提出的框架通过强类型机制实现语义可靠性，通过输入与输出类型槽位之间的证据追踪实现语义可观测性，并通过无状态并行执行保障可扩展性。我们通过实例化可复用的设计模式，在具有挑战性的基准测试中评估了 Agentics 2.0 中的程序，包括用于数据驱动发现的 DiscoveryBench 和用于自然语言到 SQL 语义解析的 Archer，均展现出业界领先的表现。

title: Code Fingerprints: Disentangled Attribution of LLM-Generated Code
authors: Jiaxun Guo, Ziyuan Yang, Mengyu Sun, Hui Wang, Jingfeng Lu, Yi Zhang
abstract: The rapid adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) has transformed modern software development by enabling automated code generation at scale. While these systems improve productivity, they introduce new challenges for software governance, accountability, and compliance. Existing research primarily focuses on distinguishing machine-generated code from human-written code; however, many practical scenarios--such as vulnerability triage, incident investigation, and licensing audits--require identifying which LLM produced a given code snippet. In this paper, we study the problem of model-level code attribution, which aims to determine the source LLM responsible for generated code. Although attribution is challenging, differences in training data, architectures, alignment strategies, and decoding mechanisms introduce model-dependent stylistic and structural variations that serve as generative fingerprints. Leveraging this observation, we propose the Disentangled Code Attribution Network (DCAN), which separates Source-Agnostic semantic information from Source-Specific stylistic representations. Through a contrastive learning objective, DCAN isolates discriminative model-dependent signals while preserving task semantics, enabling multi-class attribution across models and programming languages. To support systematic evaluation, we construct the first large-scale benchmark dataset comprising code generated by four widely used LLMs (DeepSeek, Claude, Qwen, and ChatGPT) across four programming languages (Python, Java, C, and Go). Experimental results demonstrate that DCAN achieves reliable attribution performance across diverse settings, highlighting the feasibility of model-level provenance analysis in software engineering contexts. The dataset and implementation are publicly available at https://github.com/mtt500/DCAN.
title_zh: 代码指纹：大语言模型生成代码的解耦溯源
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）的快速普及，已通过实现大规模自动化代码生成，深刻改变了现代软件开发的面貌。尽管这些系统显著提升了开发效率，但也带来了软件治理、责任归属和合规性方面的全新挑战。现有研究主要聚焦于区分机器生成代码与人工编写的代码，然而在许多实际场景中——如漏洞优先级排序、事件调查以及许可证审计——更关键的需求是识别出生成特定代码片段所使用的具体LLM。本文研究了模型级别的代码溯源问题，旨在确定生成某段代码的源LLM。尽管该任务极具挑战性，但训练数据、模型架构、对齐策略以及解码机制等方面的差异，会引入具有模型特异性的风格与结构特征，这些特征可作为生成行为的“指纹”。基于这一观察，我们提出了去耦合代码溯源网络（Disentangled Code Attribution Network, DCAN），该模型将与源无关的语义信息与与源相关的风格表征进行分离。通过对比学习目标，DCAN能够有效提取具有区分性的模型依赖信号，同时保留任务的语义完整性，从而实现跨多种模型和编程语言的多类别溯源。为支持系统化评估，我们构建了首个大规模基准数据集，包含四种广泛应用的LLM（DeepSeek、Claude、Qwen 和 ChatGPT）在四种编程语言（Python、Java、C 和 Go）上生成的代码。实验结果表明，DCAN在多种复杂场景下均表现出可靠的溯源性能，充分证明了在软件工程背景下进行模型级代码来源分析的可行性。相关数据集与代码实现已公开发布于 https://github.com/mtt500/DCAN。

title: $V_1$: Unifying Generation and Self-Verification for Parallel Reasoners
authors: Harman Singh, Xiuyu Li, Kusha Sareen, Monishwaran Maheswaran, Sijun Tan, Xiaoxia Wu, Junxiong Wang, Alpay Ariyak, Qingyang Wu, Samir Khaki, Rishabh Tiwari, Long Lian, Yucheng Lu, Boyi Li, Alane Suhr, Ben Athiwaratkun, Kurt Keutzer
abstract: Test-time scaling for complex reasoning tasks shows that leveraging inference-time compute, by methods such as independently sampling and aggregating multiple solutions, results in significantly better task outcomes. However, a critical bottleneck is verification: sampling is only effective if correct solutions can be reliably identified among candidates. While existing approaches typically evaluate candidates independently via scalar scoring, we demonstrate that models are substantially stronger at pairwise self-verification. Leveraging this insight, we introduce $V_1$, a framework that unifies generation and verification through efficient pairwise ranking. $V_1$ comprises two components: $V_1$-Infer, an uncertainty-guided algorithm using a tournament-based ranking that dynamically allocates self-verification compute to candidate pairs whose relative correctness is most uncertain; and $V_1$-PairRL, an RL framework that jointly trains a single model as both generator and pairwise self-verifier, ensuring the verifier adapts to the generator's evolving distribution. On code generation (LiveCodeBench, CodeContests, SWE-Bench) and math reasoning (AIME, HMMT) benchmarks, $V_1$-Infer improves Pass@1 by up to $10%$ over pointwise verification and outperforms recent test-time scaling methods while being significantly more efficient. Furthermore, $V_1$-PairRL achieves $7$--$9%$ test-time scaling gains over standard RL and pointwise joint training, and improves base Pass@1 by up to 8.7% over standard RL in a code-generation setting.
title_zh: $V_1$：统一生成与自验证以实现并行推理
abstract_zh: 在复杂推理任务中，测试时缩放（test-time scaling）表明，通过独立采样并聚合多个解法等方法利用推理时计算资源，能够显著提升任务表现。然而，一个关键瓶颈在于验证：采样方法的有效性取决于能否可靠地从候选解中识别出正确解。现有方法通常通过标量评分对候选解进行独立评估，而我们证明，模型在成对自我验证方面表现要强得多。基于这一发现，我们提出了 $V_1$ 框架，通过高效的成对排序统一生成与验证过程。$V_1$ 包含两个组件：$V_1$-Infer 是一种基于不确定性的引导算法，采用基于锦标赛的排序机制，动态地将自我验证计算分配给相对正确性最不确定的候选对；$V_1$-PairRL 是一种强化学习框架，联合训练单一模型作为生成器和成对自我验证器，确保验证器能够适应生成器分布的动态变化。在代码生成（LiveCodeBench、CodeContests、SWE-Bench）和数学推理（AIME、HMMT）基准测试中，$V_1$-Infer 相比点对点验证方法，将 Pass@1 提升了高达 10%，且优于近期的测试时缩放方法，同时效率显著更高。此外，$V_1$-PairRL 在测试时缩放方面相比标准强化学习和点对点联合训练提升了 7%–9%，在代码生成任务中，相比标准强化学习，将基础模型的 Pass@1 提升了高达 8.7%。

title: LoRA-MME: Multi-Model Ensemble of LoRA-Tuned Encoders for Code Comment Classification
authors: Md Akib Haider, Ahsan Bulbul, Nafis Fuad Shahid, Aimaan Ahmed, Mohammad Ishrak Abedin
abstract: Code comment classification is a critical task for automated software documentation and analysis. In the context of the NLBSE'26 Tool Competition, we present \textbf{LoRA-MME}, a Multi-Model Ensemble architecture utilizing Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT). Our approach addresses the multi-label classification challenge across Java, Python, and Pharo by combining the strengths of four distinct transformer encoders: UniXcoder, CodeBERT, GraphCodeBERT, and CodeBERTa. By independently fine-tuning these models using Low-Rank Adaptation(LoRA) and aggregating their predictions via a learned weighted ensemble strategy, we maximize classification performance without the memory overhead of full model fine-tuning. Our tool achieved an \textbf{F1 Weighted score of 0.7906} and a \textbf{Macro F1 of 0.6867} on the test set. However, the computational cost of the ensemble resulted in a final submission score of 41.20\%, highlighting the trade-off between semantic accuracy and inference efficiency.
title_zh: LoRA-MME：基于LoRA微调编码器的多模型集成用于代码注释分类
abstract_zh: 代码注释分类是自动化软件文档生成与分析中的关键任务。在NLBSE'26工具竞赛的背景下，我们提出了\textbf{LoRA-MME}——一种基于参数高效微调（PEFT）的多模型集成架构。该方法通过融合四种不同的Transformer编码器（UniXcoder、CodeBERT、GraphCodeBERT和CodeBERTa）的优势，解决了Java、Python和Pharo三种语言上的多标签分类挑战。我们采用低秩适应（LoRA）对这些模型进行独立微调，并通过一种可学习的加权集成策略聚合其预测结果，从而在不带来全模型微调所导致的内存开销的前提下，最大化分类性能。我们的工具在测试集上取得了\textbf{加权F1得分为0.7906}和\textbf{宏F1得分为0.6867}的成绩。然而，由于集成结构带来的计算开销，最终提交的得分仅为41.20\%，凸显了语义准确性与推理效率之间的权衡。

title: A Rubric-Supervised Critic from Sparse Real-World Outcomes
authors: Xingyao Wang, Valerie Chen, Heng Ji, Graham Neubig
abstract: Academic benchmarks for coding agents tend to reward autonomous task completion, measured by verifiable rewards such as unit-test success. In contrast, real-world coding agents operate with humans in the loop, where success signals are typically noisy, delayed, and sparse. How can we bridge this gap? In this paper, we propose a process to learn a "critic" model from sparse and noisy interaction data, which can then be used both as a reward model for either RL-based training or inference-time scaling. Specifically, we introduce Critic Rubrics, a rubric-based supervision framework with 24 behavioral features that can be derived from human-agent interaction traces alone. Using a semi-supervised objective, we can then jointly predict these rubrics and sparse human feedback (when present). In experiments, we demonstrate that, despite being trained primarily from trace-observable rubrics and sparse real-world outcome proxies, these critics improve best-of-N reranking on SWE-bench (Best@8 +15.9 over Random@8 over the rerankable subset of trajectories), enable early stopping (+17.7 with 83% fewer attempts), and support training-time data curation via critic-selected trajectories.
title_zh: 基于稀疏现实结果的评分标准监督评论员
abstract_zh: 学术界对编码智能体的评估基准通常倾向于奖励自主完成任务的能力，其衡量标准是可验证的奖励信号，例如单元测试的成功率。然而，在现实世界中，编码智能体通常与人类协同工作，此时成功信号往往是噪声大、延迟高且稀疏的。如何弥合这一差距？本文提出了一种从稀疏且带有噪声的交互数据中学习“评判者”（critic）模型的流程，该模型可被用于强化学习训练或推理阶段的规模扩展，作为奖励模型。具体而言，我们引入了“评判标准（Critic Rubrics）”——一种基于评分标准的监督框架，包含24个可从人类-智能体交互轨迹中直接提取的行为特征。通过采用半监督目标，我们能够联合预测这些评判标准以及稀疏的人类反馈（当存在时）。实验表明，尽管这些评判者主要基于可从轨迹中观测到的评判标准和稀疏的真实世界结果代理进行训练，但它们显著提升了SWE-bench任务上的最佳候选重排序效果（在可重排序的轨迹子集上，Best@8相比Random@8提升15.9个百分点），实现了提前终止（尝试次数减少83%的同时提升17.7），并支持在训练阶段通过评判者筛选出高质量的轨迹进行数据整理。

title: 2-Coloring Cycles in One Round
authors: Maxime Flin, Alesya Raevskaya, Ronja Stimpert, Jukka Suomela, Qingxin Yang
abstract: We show that there is a one-round randomized distributed algorithm that can 2-color cycles such that the expected fraction of monochromatic edges is less than 0.24118. We also show that a one-round algorithm cannot achieve a fraction less than 0.23879. Before this work, the best upper and lower bounds were 0.25 and 0.2. Our proof was largely discovered and developed by large language models, and both the upper and lower bounds have been formalized in Lean 4.
title_zh: 单轮2-着色环
abstract_zh: 我们证明存在一种单轮随机分布式算法，能够对环状图进行2-着色，使得单色边的期望比例小于0.24118。同时，我们还证明单轮算法无法实现低于0.23879的比例。在本项工作之前，已知的最佳上下界分别为0.25和0.2。我们的证明主要由大型语言模型发现并发展而成，且上下界均已用Lean 4形式化验证。

title: Overengineering BRC: Distributed-System Solution for Automating Compute-Heavy Data-Processing Competitions
authors: Devyash Saini, Jayadeep Bejoy
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Recent Advances in Computing and Systems (REACS)
abstract: We present the making of a distributed platform for automating end-to-end execution, benchmarking, and leaderboard ranking of compute-intensive data-processing code competition submissions. The system is built with containerization (Docker) on a Kubernetes cluster in Azure and uses RabbitMQ for task queuing, ensuring each submission runs in an isolated sandbox. Infrastructure-as-code (Terraform) defines the cloud environment to guarantee reproducibility. Our architecture uses GitHub Integrations and custom webhooks for submission handling and is implemented in a polyglot stack (Python, TypeScript, Rust) across modular microservices. Kubernetes Event-Driven Auto-scaling (KEDA) and message-driven retries provide scalability and fault tolerance, while Docker-based sandboxes enforce isolation. Logging and metrics pipelines collect performance data for ranking solutions. We evaluated the platform with the Billion Rows Challenge (BRC) as a case study, processing nearly 600 user submissions in a fully automated pipeline. Each solution was benchmarked on two data tiers (5M and 15M row datasets). The platform achieved a best runtime of 12.8349 seconds and an average runtime of 22.0431 seconds on the full 15M-row workload. Containerized execution ensured reproducibility of results, and preliminary runs on the 5M dataset verified correctness before full-scale testing. Our system's modular, cloud-native design makes it reusable for future competitions and large-scale benchmarking workflows. This demonstrates a robust, scalable solution for automated evaluation of compute-intensive code submissions.
title_zh: 过度设计BRC：用于自动化计算密集型数据处理竞赛的分布式系统解决方案
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种分布式平台的构建方案，用于自动化执行、基准测试以及排行榜排名计算密集型数据处理代码竞赛的提交结果。该系统基于Azure上的Kubernetes集群，采用容器化技术（Docker）实现，并利用RabbitMQ进行任务队列管理，确保每个提交都在独立的沙箱环境中运行。通过基础设施即代码（Terraform）定义云环境，保障了实验结果的可复现性。系统架构结合GitHub集成与自定义Webhook实现提交处理，采用多语言技术栈（Python、TypeScript、Rust）构建模块化的微服务。Kubernetes事件驱动自动伸缩（KEDA）与基于消息的重试机制提供了良好的可扩展性与容错能力，而基于Docker的沙箱环境则保证了运行环境的隔离性。日志与指标管道收集性能数据，用于对解决方案进行排名。我们以“十亿行挑战”（Billion Rows Challenge, BRC）为案例研究对平台进行了评估，在全自动流水线中处理了近600个用户提交。每个解决方案均在两个数据层级（500万行和1500万行数据集）上进行了基准测试。平台在完整1500万行数据任务上实现了最佳运行时间12.8349秒，平均运行时间为22.0431秒。容器化执行确保了结果的可复现性，而在500万行数据集上的初步运行验证了结果的正确性，为大规模测试提供了保障。本系统的模块化、云原生设计使其可复用于未来的竞赛及大规模基准测试工作流。该方案展示了针对计算密集型代码提交自动化评估的稳健且可扩展的解决方案。

title: CLINE: Improving Control Flow Compilation of Quantum Programs with Control Line Encoding
authors: Anbang Wu, Liqiang Lu, Jianwei Yin, Jingwen Leng, Minyi Guo
publish: 2026 IEEE International Symposium on High Performance Computer Architecture (HPCA)
abstract: Important applications like quantum search and quantum simulation rely on control flow implemented by oracle circuits, which may account for up to 99% of the total gate count [1] as oracle circuits consist of expensive multi-controlled (MC) quantum operations that formulate the control flow. Existing efforts optimize them by simplifying Boolean expressions associated with MC gates. They merge MC gates, if associated Boolean expressions are adjacent, to reduce the gate cost. Being more aggressive, our work introduces control line encoding (CLE), a technique that even allows merging non-adjacent MC gates by modifying their control (line) polarity. We further develop a plug-in compiler framework that efficiently applies this technique. The framework is grounded in the following observations: 1) Control flows often commute with one another and can be globally reorganized to maximize their merging by CLE; 2) numerous CLE schemes exist to allow gate merge and we can co-design CLE applications to diminish the overhead of CLE itself. Experiments demonstrate that, compared to the baseline, our framework further reduces the CX and T cost, on average by 54.7% and 56.8%, respectively.
title_zh: CLINE：通过控制线编码改进量子程序的控制流编译
abstract_zh: 像量子搜索和量子模拟等重要应用依赖于由预言机电路实现的控制流，而预言机电路可能占总门数的高达99%[1]。这是因为预言机电路包含大量昂贵的多控制（MC）量子操作，这些操作构成了控制流的核心。现有的优化方法通过简化与MC门相关的布尔表达式来降低开销，当关联的布尔表达式相邻时，会合并MC门以减少门成本。相比之下，我们的工作提出了一种更激进的控制线编码（Control Line Encoding, CLE）技术，该技术通过改变控制线的极性，使得原本不相邻的MC门也能被合并。我们进一步开发了一个可插拔的编译器框架，高效地应用这一技术。该框架基于以下两个关键观察：1）控制流通常可以相互交换，通过全局重新组织以最大化CLE带来的合并效果；2）存在多种CLE方案可用于实现门合并，我们可以协同设计CLE的应用方式，从而有效降低CLE自身的开销。实验结果表明，与基线方法相比，我们的框架在平均上进一步将CX门成本和T门成本分别降低了54.7%和56.8%。

title: Ensemble Learning for Large Language Models in Text and Code Generation: A Survey
authors: Mari Ashiga, Wei Jie, Fan Wu, Vardan Voskanyan, Fateme Dinmohammadi, Paul Brookes, Jingzhi Gong, Zheng Wang, Rafail Giavrimis, Mike Basios, Leslie Kanthan
abstract: Generative Pretrained Transformers (GPTs) are foundational Large Language Models (LLMs) for text generation. However, individual LLMs often produce inconsistent outputs and exhibit biases, limiting their representation of diverse language patterns. The closed-source nature of many powerful LLMs further restricts industry applications due to data privacy concerns. Inspired by successes in text generation, LLM ensemble techniques are now increasingly explored for code generation. This article reviews these emerging ensemble approaches to enhance understanding, encourage further research, and promote practical implementation in both text and code generation. We categorize LLM ensembles into seven main methods—weight merging, knowledge fusion, mixture-of-experts, reward ensemble, output ensemble, routing, and cascading—analyzing capabilities of those approaches. Our findings highlight key benefits such as improved diversity representation, enhanced output quality, and greater application flexibility. These insights aid model selection for real-world tasks and crucially, lay groundwork for extending ensemble strategies to multimodal LLMs and agentic workflows.
title_zh: 大型语言模型在文本与代码生成中的集成学习：综述
abstract_zh: 生成式预训练变换器（GPT）是文本生成领域的基础性大规模语言模型（LLM）。然而，单个LLM常常产生不一致的输出并表现出偏见，限制了其对多样化语言模式的准确表征。此外，许多强大LLM的闭源特性也因数据隐私问题，制约了其在产业界的广泛应用。受文本生成领域成功经验的启发，LLM集成技术如今在代码生成领域正受到越来越多的关注。本文综述了这些新兴的集成方法，旨在增进理解、推动进一步研究，并促进其在文本与代码生成中的实际应用。我们将LLM集成方法主要分为七类：权重合并、知识融合、专家混合（Mixture-of-Experts）、奖励集成、输出集成、路由机制以及级联结构，并分析了各类方法的能力特点。研究发现，集成策略在提升输出多样性、增强生成质量以及提高应用灵活性方面具有显著优势。这些洞见有助于在实际任务中进行模型选择，更重要的是，为将集成策略拓展至多模态LLM及智能体工作流奠定了重要基础。

title: Combined AES-256 Encryption with MATLAB and Verilog HDL Biometric Authentication
authors: Pasuluri Bindu Swetha, Vasagiri Shivani, Kuruva Shivani, Shaik Mubashira, Charan Sai Raja Vennakandla, S. Fowzia Sultana
publish: 2026 7th International Conference on Mobile Computing and Sustainable Informatics (ICMCSI)
abstract: This research provides a Biometric-based AES-256 Encryption and Decryption Authentication System that combines cutting-edge cryptographic methods with fingerprint identification to offer dual-layered security. Verilog HDL implements hardware-level biometric matching and AES-256 encryption/decryption modules, while MATLAB preprocesses fingerprint images and converts them into 128-bit hexadecimal templates. The architecture was synthesized and simulated using Xilinx Vivado and includes a 256-bit key AES-256 core, a fingerprint matcher, and a Finite State Machine (FSM) controller that ensures cryptographic operations only take place when biometric authentication is completed. While study of the FPGA implementation demonstrates effective resource use, low power consumption, and minimal latency, simulation results show correct encryption, decryption, and access control.
title_zh: 结合AES-256加密与MATLAB及Verilog HDL的生物特征认证
abstract_zh: 本研究提出了一种基于生物特征的AES-256加密与解密认证系统，该系统将前沿的密码学技术与指纹识别相结合，实现了双重安全防护。系统采用Verilog HDL在硬件层面实现生物特征匹配模块以及AES-256加密/解密模块，而MATLAB则用于指纹图像的预处理，并将其转换为128位十六进制模板。整个架构通过Xilinx Vivado进行综合与仿真，包含一个256位密钥的AES-256核心、指纹匹配器以及有限状态机（FSM）控制器，确保只有在生物特征认证成功后才执行加密操作。研究对FPGA实现的分析表明，该系统具有高效的资源利用率、低功耗和极小的延迟，仿真结果验证了加密、解密及访问控制功能的正确性。

title: Leveraging ASIC AI Chips for Homomorphic Encryption
authors: Jianming Tong, Tianhao Huang, Jingtian Dang, Leo de Castro, Anirudh Itagi, Anupam Golder, Asra Ali, Jeremy Kun, Jevin Jiang, Arvind, G. Edward Suh, Tushar Krishna
publish: 2026 IEEE International Symposium on High Performance Computer Architecture (HPCA)
abstract: Homomorphic Encryption (HE) provides strong data privacy for cloud services but at the cost of prohibitive computational overhead. While GPUs have emerged as a practical platform for accelerating HE, there remains an order-ofmagnitude energy-efficiency gap compared to specialized (but expensive) HE ASICs. This paper explores an alternate direction: leveraging existing AI accelerators, like Google's TPUs with coarse-grained compute and memory architectures, to offer a path toward ASIC-level energy efficiency for HE. However, this architectural paradigm creates a fundamental mismatch with SoTA HE algorithms designed for GPUs. These algorithms rely heavily on: (1) high-precision (32-bit) integer arithmetic to now run on a TPU's low-throughput vector unit, leaving its high-throughput low-precision (8-bit) matrix engine (MXU) idle, and (2) fine-grained data permutations that are inefficient on the TPU's coarse-grained memory subsystem. Consequently, porting GPU-optimized HE libraries to TPUs results in severe resource under-utilization and performance degradation. To tackle above challenges, we introduce CROSS, a compiler framework that systematically transforms HE workloads to align with the TPU's architecture. CROSS makes two key contributions: (1) Basis-Aligned Transformation (BAT), a novel technique that converts high-precision modular arithmetic into dense, low-precision (INT8) matrix multiplications, unlocking and improving the utilization of TPU's MXU for HE, and (2) Memory-Aligned Transformation (MAT), which eliminates costly runtime data reordering by embedding reordering into compute kernels through offline parameter transformation. Our evaluation on a real single-host Google TPU v6e refreshes the SoTA Number Theoretic Transform (NTT) throughput record with up-to <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$1.43 \times$</tex> throughput improvement over WarpDrive on a NVIDIA A100. Furthermore, CROSS achieves <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$451 \times, 7.81 \times, 1.83 \times, 1.31 \times, 1.86 \times$</tex>, and <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$1.15 \times$</tex> higher throughput per watt than OpenFHE, WarpDrive, FIDESlib, FAB, HEAP, and Cheddar, respectively, establishing AI ASIC as the SotA efficient platform for HE operators. Code: https://github.com/EfficientPPML/CROSS.
title_zh: 利用ASIC人工智能芯片实现同态加密
abstract_zh:
同态加密（Homomorphic Encryption, HE）为云服务提供了强大的数据隐私保护，但其代价是高昂的计算开销。尽管GPU已成为加速HE的实用平台，但其能效仍比专用（但昂贵）的HE ASIC低一个数量级。本文探索了一条新路径：利用现有的AI加速器（如谷歌TPU），其具有粗粒度的计算与内存架构，以期实现接近ASIC级别的能效。然而，这种架构范式与当前最先进的HE算法（专为GPU设计）存在根本性不匹配。这些算法高度依赖：（1）高精度（32位）整数运算，而TPU的低吞吐向量单元难以高效处理，导致其高吞吐、低精度（8位）矩阵引擎（MXU）闲置；（2）细粒度的数据重排操作，在TPU粗粒度的内存子系统上效率极低。因此，将GPU优化的HE库移植到TPU上，会导致严重的资源利用率低下和性能下降。

为应对上述挑战，我们提出了CROSS——一个编译器框架，系统性地将HE工作负载转换为与TPU架构相匹配的形式。CROSS的两大核心贡献如下：（1）**基对齐变换**（Basis-Aligned Transformation, BAT），一种新颖技术，将高精度模运算转换为密集的低精度（INT8）矩阵乘法，从而充分激活并提升TPU的MXU在HE任务中的利用率；（2）**内存对齐变换**（Memory-Aligned Transformation, MAT），通过离线参数变换将数据重排操作嵌入计算内核，彻底消除运行时昂贵的数据重排开销。

我们在真实的单机谷歌TPU v6e上进行了评估，CROSS刷新了当前最先进的数论变换（NTT）吞吐量纪录，相比NVIDIA A100上的WarpDrive，吞吐量最高提升达1.43倍。此外，CROSS在能效方面表现卓越，相比OpenFHE、WarpDrive、FIDESlib、FAB、HEAP和Cheddar，分别实现了451倍、7.81倍、1.83倍、1.31倍、1.86倍和1.15倍的每瓦特吞吐量提升，确立了AI ASIC作为当前最高效的HE运算平台。代码地址：https://github.com/EfficientPPML/CROSS。

title: Survey and Design of Optimized Network-On-Chip Router
authors: Sowmya B J, Manjunath Managuli
publish: 2025 2nd Asia Pacific Conference on Innovation in Technology (APCIT)
abstract: A system on a chip is an intricate network of interconnected functional components. Since its architecture is bus-based, there is problem in proper communication necessitating the development of a system exhibiting parallelism and high scalability. Network on a chip (NoC) offered many of these features and addressed the communication bottleneck issue. It essentially operates on the principle of core interconnection via on-chip networks. Bus-based communication System on chip (SoC) problems are resolved by network on chip (NoC) technology. Network on a chip offers high speed and reliable data while maintain power requirements. The routers that make up a NoC network route data packets. Hence, this is the essential component that must be appropriately constructed to execute an effective NoC architecture. The primary limitations of classic NoC router architecture include complexity of circuits, significant crucial delay in path, utilization of resources, high speed execution and energy efficiency. It has been difficult to develop a NoC with low area overhead, high performance, and low latency. In order to understand and work toward a NoC router design that demonstrates better performance, exhibit power savings and minimized latency and can be utilized with families of FPGA, this work analyzes basics of design of NoC router, its component parts and study of previous work and their advantages and disadvantages for NoC router topologies. The work towards the design of enhanced Network on chip router with maximum benefits is attempted.
title_zh: 优化网络芯片路由器的调研与设计
abstract_zh: 片上系统（SoC）是一个由众多相互连接的功能模块构成的复杂网络。由于其架构基于总线，因此在通信方面存在诸多问题，亟需开发一种具备并行处理能力和高可扩展性的系统。网络芯片（NoC）技术提供了许多上述特性，并有效解决了通信瓶颈问题。NoC本质上是通过片上网络实现核心之间的互联，从而克服了传统基于总线的SoC在通信方面存在的局限性。与传统总线架构相比，NoC能够实现高速、可靠的数据传输，同时保持较低的功耗需求。NoC网络由路由器组成，这些路由器负责数据包的路由转发，因此，路由器是构建高效NoC架构的关键组件。然而，传统NoC路由器架构存在诸多局限，如电路复杂度高、路径延迟大、资源利用率低、高速运行与能效平衡困难等问题。因此，设计出面积开销小、性能高、延迟低的NoC路由器一直是一项挑战。为了深入理解并推动NoC路由器设计的优化，实现更优的性能、更低的功耗和更小的延迟，同时确保其能够适配多种FPGA系列，本文系统分析了NoC路由器的设计基础、核心组成模块，并对以往相关研究进行了梳理，总结了各类NoC路由器拓扑结构的优缺点。在此基础上，本文致力于设计一种性能更优、优势最大化的新一代NoC路由器。

title: Implementation of Custom VLSI Chips to Accelerate Edge AI for Real-Time Audio and Video Processing Applications
authors: A Hency Juliet, Karthiga. R, Maram Y. Al-Safarini, Bhukya Balakrishna, M. Dinesh, Peer Mohamed A
publish: 2025 2nd Asia Pacific Conference on Innovation in Technology (APCIT)
abstract: The increasing requirements of real-time audio and video processing at the edge of the network, which include but are not limited to, surveillance, autonomous, wearable electronics and smart cities, have demanded low-latency and high-fidelity computing platforms. "Existing AI systems based on the cloud are simply not enough by these standard sat, they have latency, pose privacy issues, and do not serve real-time needs. In this work, we consider custom Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI) chips for fast Edge AI processing, where we target real-time audio and video workloads. Specialized VLSI accelerators are developed with application-specific organization tailored for deep neural networks (DNNs), convolutional neural networks (CNNs), recurrent models and transformer-based processing. The VLSI system is optimized in terms of high-throughput in parallel data pipelines, energy efficiency, as well as domain-specific accelerators for speech recognition, face detection, object tracking, and noise removal. Optimization at the hardware level, such as the application of fixed-point arithmetic, redesign of memory hierarchy and custom instruction set development, are included to allow a larger performance advantage over a generic processor or a GPU. The system is designed and implemented, in a design flow, which consists of HW/SW codesigning, synthesis, simulation and silicon layout optimization using commercial EDA tools. Benchmarks with live time-critical tasks such as live video processing for surveillance, on-line speech command interpretation and online multi-object tracking in changing environments are considered to allow assessment of the chip architecture. Results show up to 10× improvement in inference latency and a reduction of up to 65% power consumption with respect to traditional CPU/GPU-based solutions on the same workloads. Additionally, the study presents a modular chiplet the architecture and scalability and application specific partitioning for edge AI systems that have a mix of inputs. The proposed architecture also adds adaptive workload scheduling and dynamic voltage-frequency scaling (DVFS) scheme to boost performance in different working modes. Hardware-integrated security primitives safeguard data authenticity and defend AI models against untrusted parties looking to alter the model. This work lays the groundwork toward the development of hardware-optimized edge AI systems for the latency-, power-, and scalability-restricted realm of real-time audio-video processing. As a result, custom VLSI implementation enables performance improvement and provides a way toward embedding AI into lightweight, and energy-constrained-edge devices. The findings are a significant step toward making pervasive, general-purpose computing more of a reality in settings where speed, precision and dependability are essential, Kitchin says.
title_zh: 用于实时音视频处理应用的边缘AI加速的定制VLSI芯片实现
abstract_zh:
随着网络边缘对实时音视频处理需求的不断增长，涵盖监控、自动驾驶、可穿戴电子设备以及智慧城市等多个领域，对低延迟、高保真度的计算平台提出了更高要求。现有的基于云的AI系统已无法满足这些标准：它们存在延迟问题，带来隐私隐患，且难以应对实时性需求。本文提出采用定制化的超大规模集成电路（VLSI）芯片，以实现高效的边缘AI处理，重点面向实时音视频处理任务。为此，我们开发了针对深度神经网络（DNN）、卷积神经网络（CNN）、循环模型及基于Transformer的处理任务进行优化的专用VLSI加速器，其架构根据具体应用需求进行定制化设计。

该VLSI系统在高吞吐量并行数据流水线、能效比以及面向语音识别、人脸检测、目标跟踪和噪声消除等特定领域的加速器方面均进行了优化。在硬件层面，通过采用定点运算、重构存储层次结构以及开发专用指令集等技术，进一步提升了性能，使其显著优于通用处理器或GPU。整个系统采用包含软硬件协同设计、综合、仿真及使用商用EDA工具进行硅片版图优化的设计流程完成设计与实现。

为评估芯片架构的实际表现，我们引入了多项实时关键任务的基准测试，包括监控场景下的实时视频处理、在线语音指令解析，以及在动态环境下的在线多目标跟踪。实验结果表明，与传统基于CPU/GPU的解决方案相比，该芯片在相同工作负载下推理延迟最高降低达10倍，功耗减少高达65%。
