此外，本研究还提出了一种模块化芯片小片（chiplet）架构，具备良好的可扩展性与面向特定应用的输入混合场景的分区能力。所提出的架构还集成了自适应工作负载调度机制与动态电压频率调节（DVFS）方案，以在不同工作模式下提升系统性能。硬件集成的安全原语可保障数据的真实性，并防范外部不可信实体对AI模型的篡改行为。

本工作为开发面向低延迟、低功耗与高可扩展性限制的实时音视频处理场景的硬件优化边缘AI系统奠定了坚实基础。定制化VLSI实现不仅显著提升了性能，也为将AI嵌入轻量化、低功耗的边缘设备提供了可行路径。正如基钦（Kitchin）所言，这些成果是推动在对速度、精度与可靠性要求极高的环境中实现无处不在的通用计算迈出了重要一步。

title: Pose-Free Radiance Reconstruction with Depth and Exposure Priors on a Cloud-Native Hybrid KAN Framework
authors: Zhuohao Gong, Xinyang Guo, Wenxin Hu, Yanjie Li, Weichu Liu, Xiping Hu
abstract: Training neural radiance fields without pre-estimated camera poses remains challenging, particularly in the presence of complex illumination and large inter-frame motion. This work presents a self-calibrating radiance-field framework designed to address these difficulties through a unified optimization strategy. Reliable monocular depth priors from the Depth Anything V2 model are incorporated to provide stable geometric constraints, and multiview point-cloud alignment is enforced to prevent pose drift under wide baselines. Illumination-induced photometric inconsistencies are handled by a jointly optimized exposure-compensation module that separates transient brightness variations from the underlying scene radiance. To enhance the representational capacity beyond that of standard multilayer perceptrons, a Kolmogorov-Arnold Network is adopted as the radiance-field backbone, enabling improved recovery of fine geometric and appearance details. The complete pipeline is deployed on a cloud-native infrastructure that supports scalable optimization and interactive access through an LLM-assisted interface. Experiments on indoor and outdoor datasets demonstrate that the proposed method consistently improves pose accuracy and novel-view synthesis quality over existing self-calibrating approaches.
title_zh: 基于云原生混合KAN框架的无姿态辐射重建方法：结合深度与曝光先验
abstract_zh: 在缺乏预估相机位姿的情况下训练神经辐射场仍然具有挑战性，尤其是在复杂光照条件和大帧间运动的情况下。本文提出了一种自校准的辐射场框架，通过统一的优化策略来应对这些难题。该方法引入了来自Depth Anything V2模型的可靠单目深度先验，以提供稳定的几何约束，并通过多视角点云对齐来防止在宽基线情况下的位姿漂移。针对光照引起的光度不一致性问题，设计了一个联合优化的曝光补偿模块，能够将瞬时亮度变化与场景固有辐射分离。为了提升模型的表达能力，超越标准多层感知机的性能，本文采用Kolmogorov-Arnold网络作为辐射场的主干结构，从而更有效地恢复精细的几何与外观细节。整个流程部署在云原生基础设施上，支持可扩展的优化以及通过LLM辅助界面实现的交互式访问。在室内和室外数据集上的实验表明，所提出的方法在位姿精度和新视角合成质量方面，均持续优于现有的自校准方法。

title: An 8-Bit ALU Based in AXI4-Lite for Applications Along with SOCs
authors: Pasuluri Bindu Swetha, Shaik Mohammad Shoaib, ChandraMouli R, K Siva Rama Prasad, Charan Sai Raja Vennakandla, S. Fowzia Sultana
publish: 2026 7th International Conference on Mobile Computing and Sustainable Informatics (ICMCSI)
abstract: The phenomenal upsurge in embedded, portable, and System-on-Chip (SoC) platforms has been a great encouragement in the demand for computational units whose output power is less while the functionality is more phenomenal. The Arithmetic Logic Unit (ALU), as an integral constituent of any digital processor, greatly affects the entire consumption of energy and its performance. This paper presents the IEEE journal-formatted design and simulation of a low-power 8-bit ALU integrated with an AMBA AXI4-Lite slave interface using Verilog HDL. The power-saving architecture supports arithmetic and logical operations that include addition, subtraction, AND, OR, XOR, and shift operations together with power optimization techniques such as clock gating and operand isolation. The AXI4-Lite interface provides standardized, low-overhead communication with external masters, realizing SoC integration. Functional verification and synthesis have been performed on FPGA design tools, and power analysis confirms measurable dynamic power consumption reduction without compromising timing constraints. Scalable and modular, the proposed ALU architecture can be used for energy-efficient embedded and FPGA-based applications.
title_zh: 基于AXI4-Lite的8位ALU在系统级芯片（SoC）应用中的实现
abstract_zh: 嵌入式、便携式及片上系统（SoC）平台的迅猛发展，极大地推动了对功耗低而功能强大的计算单元的需求。作为任何数字处理器的核心组成部分，算术逻辑单元（ALU）对整体能耗和性能具有重大影响。本文提出了一种符合IEEE期刊格式的低功耗8位ALU设计与仿真，该ALU集成了AMBA AXI4-Lite从机接口，采用Verilog HDL实现。所提出的低功耗架构支持加法、减法、与（AND）、或（OR）、异或（XOR）及移位等算术与逻辑运算，并结合了时钟门控和操作数隔离等功耗优化技术。AXI4-Lite接口提供了标准化、低开销的外部主设备通信，实现了与SoC的无缝集成。通过FPGA设计工具完成了功能验证与综合，并通过功耗分析证实了在不违反时序约束的前提下，动态功耗显著降低。该ALU架构具有良好的可扩展性与模块化特性，适用于节能型嵌入式系统及基于FPGA的应用场景。

title: HealNet-Auto: A Generative AI–Driven Self-Healing Framework Using Adaptive AutoML Pipelines
authors: R.Arun Kumar, Krish Raghul, Arjun.G, Sugadev.V.M, Ragul Tamilarasan, Gowtham Prabhakaran A
publish: 2025 2nd Asia Pacific Conference on Innovation in Technology (APCIT)
abstract: In an era of increasingly complex software systems, the ability to autonomously detect, diagnose, and recover from runtime failures is pivotal for ensuring reliability, availability, and resilience. In this paper we introduce HealNet-Auto, a new type of self-healing software framework that harmonizes Generative AI with AutoML pipelines to provide intelligent, adaptive, and explainable recovery schemes. HealNet-Auto is an auxiliary system that constantly reads system logs, telemetry, and performance data with the help of AutoGluon-optimized data containers to identify anomalies at an accuracy of 96.8%. When an anomaly is detected, the system uses a fine-tuned CodeT5 model to produce root cause summaries and categorize faults, such as logic error, configuration and dependency failure. Reinforcement learning improves decision-making engine, which dynamically chooses the healing strategy, which could be restart, rollback, or patching over the code. In case of patching selection, generative model generates possible fixes which are eventually semantically checked and dynamically tested. The patch framework has a patch successful rate of 90.7% with an average of 13.1 seconds in the average recovery and only 3.9% in rollback triggers in various fault situations. A wide variety of comparisons with common systems proves the efficacy of HealNet-Auto in relation to the precision, adjustability, and healing fastness. We are contributing an in-depth, end-to-end healing pipeline that is fully automated, continuously learning, and explains itself; that is, our contributions can be deployed in cloud-native, microservice, and edge settings. This available framework has a huge potential of transforming the architecture of resilient, self-managing computer software.
title_zh: HealNet-Auto：一种基于生成式人工智能的自愈框架，采用自适应自动机器学习流水线
abstract_zh: 在软件系统日益复杂的今天，能够自主检测、诊断并从运行时故障中恢复的能力，对于保障系统的可靠性、可用性和弹性至关重要。本文提出了一种新型自愈软件框架——HealNet-Auto，该框架将生成式人工智能（Generative AI）与AutoML流水线相融合，提供智能、自适应且可解释的恢复方案。HealNet-Auto作为一个辅助系统，借助AutoGluon优化的数据容器，持续读取系统日志、遥测数据和性能指标，以96.8%的准确率识别异常。一旦检测到异常，系统将使用微调后的CodeT5模型生成根本原因摘要，并对故障进行分类，如逻辑错误、配置错误或依赖失败等。强化学习优化了决策引擎，使其能够动态选择最合适的修复策略——包括重启、回滚或代码修补。在选择修补策略时，生成式模型会生成可能的修复方案，随后通过语义验证和动态测试进行筛选。该修补框架在各种故障场景下，平均恢复时间仅为13.1秒，修复成功率高达90.7%，回滚触发率仅为3.9%。与多种主流系统进行的广泛对比实验充分证明了HealNet-Auto在精度、可调性及恢复速度方面的显著优势。我们贡献了一个端到端、完全自动化、持续学习并具备自我解释能力的修复流程，该系统可部署于云原生、微服务及边缘计算等多样化环境。这一可落地的框架具有巨大潜力，将深刻变革弹性、自管理计算机软件的架构范式。

title: MACV: A Specialized Multi-Agent and Consensus Framework for Reliable LLM Outputs
authors: Rakesh More, Sudarshan Varma, Nilay Varma
publish: 2026 7th International Conference on Mobile Computing and Sustainable Informatics (ICMCSI)
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) write smoothly but still sometimes make believable yet incorrect or unsupported claims so called hallucinations. To address this, we propose MACV (Multi-Agent Cross-Verification), a modular system that has several cooperating components; a Primary Response Generator (PRG) that drafts answers; a Fact Checking Agent (FCA) that checks claims against external sources like Wikipedia or PubMed; a Domain-Specific Validator (DSV) that inspects specialist content using structured datasets and ontologies; an Adversarial Tester (AT) that looks for contradictions and weak reasoning; and finally a Consensus Mechanism that combines agent outputs into a confidence-tagged final response. We explain the architecture, agent interfaces, consensus strategies, and how we evaluate the system. Tests on benchmarks—SQuAD, SciQ, and FinQA datasets show MACV meaningfully lowers hallucination rates compared with single-LLM and RAG baselines while adding modest compute overhead. We also examine failure modes, scalability trade-offs, and practical deployment issues, and conclude that heterogeneous, cross-checking agents are a promising path toward more reliable LLM behavior in realworld settings.
title_zh: MACV：一种用于可靠大语言模型输出的专用多智能体与共识框架
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）虽然能够流畅地生成文本，但仍时常出现看似合理却错误或缺乏支持的陈述，即所谓的“幻觉”问题。为解决这一问题，我们提出了MACV（多智能体交叉验证）系统，这是一个模块化架构，包含多个协同工作的组件：主响应生成器（PRG）负责起草答案；事实核查代理（FCA）通过外部资源（如维基百科或PubMed）验证陈述的真实性；领域特定验证器（DSV）利用结构化数据集和本体对专业内容进行审查；对抗性测试者（AT）则负责发现矛盾之处和推理薄弱环节；最后，共识机制将各代理的输出整合为带有置信度标签的最终响应。本文详细阐述了系统的架构设计、各代理的接口规范、共识策略，并介绍了评估方法。在SQuAD、SciQ和FinQA等基准数据集上的测试表明，与单一LLM及RAG基线相比，MACV显著降低了幻觉率，同时仅带来适度的计算开销。我们还分析了系统的失败模式、可扩展性权衡以及实际部署中的挑战，最终得出结论：异构且具备交叉验证能力的智能体组合，是提升大型语言模型在真实场景中可靠性的一条有前景的路径。

title: TEMP: A Memory Efficient Physical-Aware Tensor Partition-Mapping Framework on Wafer-Scale Chips
authors: Huizheng Wang, Taiquan Wei, Zichuan Wang, Dingcheng Jiang, Qize Yang, Jiaxin Liu, Jingxiang Hou, Chao Li, Jinyi Deng, Yang Hu, Shouyi Yin
publish: 2026 IEEE International Symposium on High Performance Computer Architecture (HPCA)
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) demand significant memory and computation resources. Wafer-scale chips (WSCs) provide high computation power and die-to-die (D2D) bandwidth but face a unique trade-off between on-chip memory and compute resources due to limited wafer area. Therefore, tensor parallelism strategies for wafer should leverage communication advantages while maintaining memory efficiency to maximize WSC performance. However, existing approaches fail to address these challenges. To address these challenges, we propose the tensor stream partition paradigm (TSPP), which reveals an opportunity to leverage WSCs' abundant communication bandwidth to alleviate stringent on-chip memory constraints. However, the 2D mesh topology of WSCs lacks long-distance and flexible interconnects, leading to three challenges: 1) severe tail latency, 2) prohibitive D2D traffic contention, and 3) intractable search time for optimal design. We present TEMP, a framework for LLM training on WSCs that leverages topology-aware tensor-stream partition, trafficconscious mapping, and dual-level wafer solving to overcome hardware constraints and parallelism challenges. These integrated approaches optimize memory efficiency and throughput, unlocking TSPP's full potential on WSCs. Evaluations show TEMP achieves <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$1.7 \times$</tex> average throughput improvement over state-of-the-art LLM training systems across various models.
title_zh: TEMP：一种面向晶圆级芯片的内存高效物理感知张量分区映射框架
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）需要大量的内存和计算资源。晶圆级芯片（Wafer-scale Chips, WSCs）提供了高计算能力以及芯片间（D2D）带宽，但由于晶圆面积有限，其片上内存与计算资源之间存在独特的权衡。因此，面向晶圆级芯片的张量并行策略需充分利用通信优势，同时保持内存效率，以最大化WSC的性能。然而，现有方法未能有效应对这些挑战。为解决上述问题，我们提出张量流划分范式（Tensor Stream Partition Paradigm, TSPP），揭示了利用WSC丰富的通信带宽来缓解片上内存严格限制的潜力。然而，WSC的二维网格拓扑缺乏长距离和灵活的互连，导致三个关键挑战：1）严重的尾部延迟；2）难以承受的D2D通信竞争；3）最优设计搜索时间过长。为此，我们提出TEMP框架，用于在WSC上进行LLM训练。TEMP通过拓扑感知的张量流划分、流量感知的映射策略以及双层晶圆求解机制，有效克服硬件限制与并行性挑战。这些集成方法显著优化了内存效率与吞吐量，充分释放了TSPP在WSC上的潜力。评估结果表明，TEMP在多种模型上相比当前最先进的LLM训练系统，平均吞吐量提升达1.7倍。

title: Experimental Analysis of LFENCE-Based Mitigation Against Speculative Execution Side Channels
authors: Neeraj Krishnan Mullakkara, Sreeraj Rajagopal Nair, Rajesh Kannan Megalingam
publish: 2026 7th International Conference on Mobile Computing and Sustainable Informatics (ICMCSI)
abstract: Speculative execution increases the performance of the processor by predicting and executing instructions out of order, allowing for faster computation in modern CPUs. However, it introduces critical vulnerabilities that enable transient attacks to leak sensitive data through covert hardware channels, exploiting mechanisms like branch misprediction and out-of-order execution. This project studies the time taken in different cases, both with and without LFENCE, with detailed analysis. LFENCE acts as a speculation barrier to halt risky predictions and mitigate timing leaks. Our results highlight the differences in execution times, providing insights into how speculation influences cache behavior and creates exploitable gaps. Using Python-based visualizations, we map these timing patterns to offer clear insights into vulnerabilities and defenses. By incorporating various defense mechanisms, including LFENCE and other hardware security strategies, this study demonstrates their role in reducing transient leaks, offering a practical understanding of execution timing impacts and performance trade-offs. This accessible demonstration bridges theoretical hardware security concepts with real-world observations, emphasizing effective countermeasures without requiring extensive hardware modifications.
title_zh: 基于LFENCE的缓解机制对抗推测执行侧信道的实验分析
abstract_zh: 推测执行通过预测并乱序执行指令，提升了处理器的性能，使现代CPU能够实现更快的计算。然而，这一机制也引入了严重的安全漏洞，使得瞬态攻击能够通过隐蔽的硬件通道泄露敏感数据，利用分支预测错误和乱序执行等机制进行攻击。本项目研究了在不同情况下（有无LFENCE指令）的执行时间，并进行了详细分析。LFENCE作为一种推测屏障，可阻止危险的预测行为，从而缓解时序信息泄露问题。实验结果揭示了执行时间的显著差异，深入展示了推测执行如何影响缓存行为，并产生可被利用的安全漏洞。通过基于Python的可视化手段，我们对这些时序模式进行了映射，清晰呈现了安全漏洞的特征及防御策略的有效性。结合LFENCE及其他硬件安全机制，本研究展示了多种防御措施在减少瞬态泄露方面的实际效果，深入理解了执行时序对性能带来的影响以及相应的权衡。该演示以直观易懂的方式，将理论上的硬件安全概念与实际观测结果相连接，强调了有效防护措施的重要性，且无需进行复杂的硬件修改即可实现。

title: Verilog-Enabled Simulation and RTL Synthesis of SPECK Algorithm for Robust and High-Speed Cryptographic Operations in VLSI
authors: Pravin A. Dwaramwar, Ashish Avasthi, Somu Chinnusamy, Prasanna Kumar Sistla, Chitranjan Dwivedi, T.C. Manjunath
publish: 2025 International Conference on Power Electronics and Energy (ICPEE)
abstract: The article displays an comprehensive approaches for the $h / w$ realizing of the SPECK based lighter weighted block-cipher based verilog simulated & the RTL synthesized applications in the VLSI depended cryptographical systems. The proposed method will consists of the designing of the SPECK also & its functional evaluations, thus aiming very higher through puts & the robust type of encryptions which are suitable for the resources based constrained environment. The results of experimentation demonstrates the algo’s suitable parameters for their $h / w$ realization or the implementations, thus exhibiting very lesser area in the overheads, having higher speed of operations & very much secured strength in the cryptographic features, thus making this algo very much ideal for current technological VLSI depended solutions for the security needs. Apart from this, to prove its efficiency, the verilog dependent RTL implementations of the SPECK algos is very much ideal for the constrained resourced VLSI environment, where the performance & the security of the algo matters a lot. In order to leverage this algo’s simple concepts, such as the ARC, Addition, Rotation, XOR operation, the designed model will minimize the $h / w$ complexity in design aspects. The Speck’s flexibilities also allow the performances in the scaling concept across a wide range in the $h / w$ target, that too from the FPGA’s to the ASIC’s, in the sense not too much sacrifice is done in the robustness to the cryptographic need. Therefore, the conducted research will not only do the validation of the feasibility in the practical aspects of the higher speeds SPECKs deploying in the current technological cryptographical circuit, which also will demonstrate the potential for a wider spreading in the adoption w.r.t. the demonstration of the potentials in a no. of applications such as IoT, embedded systems, next generation secured communications frameworks where there is a $\mathbf{h} / \mathbf{w}$ efficiency & protection of the datas which are more critical in priority.
title_zh: 基于Verilog的SPECK算法仿真与RTL综合实现：面向VLSI的鲁棒高效加密运算
abstract_zh:
本文展示了基于SPECK的轻量级分组密码在VLSI依赖型密码系统中实现 $h/w$（硬件/软件）高效性的综合方法，涵盖Verilog仿真与RTL综合的应用。所提出的方法包括SPECK的设计及其功能评估，旨在实现极高的吞吐量以及适用于资源受限环境的稳健加密性能。实验结果表明，该算法在 $h/w$ 实现方面具备合适的参数配置，展现出极小的面积开销、更高的运行速度以及强大的加密安全性，使其成为当前VLSI技术背景下满足安全需求的理想选择。

此外，为验证其高效性，基于Verilog的SPECK算法RTL实现方案在资源受限的VLSI环境中表现出色，尤其在性能与安全性均至关重要的场景下更具优势。通过充分利用SPECK算法中简单而高效的计算概念，如循环移位（ARC）、加法、循环左/右移位及异或（XOR）操作，所设计的模型显著降低了硬件实现的复杂度。SPECK算法的灵活性还使其能够在广泛的 $h/w$ 目标范围内实现可扩展性，无论是FPGA还是ASIC平台，均能保持较高的安全性，无需在加密强度上做出过多妥协。

因此，本研究不仅从实践角度验证了高速SPECK算法在当前技术条件下密码电路中的可行性，更展示了其在多个应用场景中广泛推广的巨大潜力，如物联网（IoT）、嵌入式系统以及下一代安全通信框架等。在这些应用中，$h/w$ 效率与数据保护的优先级尤为突出，而SPECK算法恰好能够满足这些关键需求，具有重要的现实意义与应用前景。

title: Design and Implementation of Enhanced Multiplier-Free Architecture for VLSI Signal Processing
authors: Veera Boopathy E, Raghul G, Madhusudan Kulkarni, Syed Nageena Parveen, Thamilselvi R M, Vignesh M
publish: 2025 2nd Asia Pacific Conference on Innovation in Technology (APCIT)
abstract: High-throughput Datapath architecture is a critical issue in modern VLSI system design, especially high-performance Digital Signal Processing (DSP) systems. This paper presents an effective and compact 4-tap programmable Finite Impulse Response (FIR) filter architecture that uses a multiplexer-logic-based architectural design that is based on the Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) methodology, in which the traditional multipliers are replaced with shift and add operations. Moreover, architecture presents a new Multiplexer-Based Full Adder (MBFA) using a transmission gate to perform arithmetic functions with lower complexities. Further, a simplified Carry Select Adder (CSLA) is introduced, which comprises a single Ripple Carry Adder (RCA) enhanced with MBFA units, which provides significant area and delay savings as redundant adder paths are removed. A carry save adder (CSVA) is optimized, and also the delay elements are synthesized in the form of transmission gates and placed in the filter pipeline. The final implementation is analyzed by the TANNER EDA tool, displaying area savings of up to 16% and a reduction of up to 22% delay compared to that of a conventional FIR filter implementation. In addition, the suggested CSLA possesses impressive area and delay reduction of 49% and 65.5% respectively, compared to traditional CSLAs, confirming its suitability in low-power, high-speed DSP cores of modern VLSI systems.
title_zh: 面向VLSI信号处理的增强型无乘法器架构设计与实现
abstract_zh: 高速数据通路架构是现代VLSI系统设计中的关键问题，尤其是在高性能数字信号处理（DSP）系统中。本文提出了一种高效且紧凑的4抽头可编程有限冲激响应（FIR）滤波器架构，该架构基于快速傅里叶变换（FFT）方法，采用基于多路选择器-逻辑的结构设计，用移位与加法操作替代了传统的乘法器。此外，该架构引入了一种新型的基于多路选择器的全加器（MBFA），利用传输门实现算术功能，显著降低了电路复杂度。同时，提出了一种简化的进位选择加法器（CSLA），其由一个单级行波进位加法器（RCA）结合MBFA单元构成，通过消除冗余的加法路径，实现了显著的面积和延迟节省。此外，对进位保存加法器（CSVA）进行了优化，并将延迟元件以传输门形式综合，置于滤波器流水线中。最终的实现通过TANNER EDA工具进行分析，结果显示相比传统FIR滤波器实现，面积最多减少16%，延迟最多降低22%。此外，所提出的CSLA相较于传统CSLA，在面积和延迟方面分别实现了49%和65.5%的显著降低，充分证明了其在现代VLSI系统中低功耗、高速DSP核心应用中的适用性。

title: Nugget: Portable Program Snippets
authors: Zhantong Qiu, Mahyar Samani, Jason Lowe-Power
publish: 2026 IEEE International Symposium on High Performance Computer Architecture (HPCA)
abstract: Evaluating architectural ideas on realistic workloads is increasingly challenging due to the prohibitive cost of detailed simulation and the lack of portable sampling tools. Existing targeted sampling techniques are often tied to specific binaries, incur significant overhead, and make rapid validation across systems infeasible. To address these limitations, we introduce Nugget, a flexible framework that enables portable sampling across simulators, hardware, architectural differences, and libraries. Nugget leverages LLVM IR to perform binary-independent interval analysis, then generates lightweight, cross-platform executable snippets, nuggets, that can be validated natively on real hardware before use in simulation. This approach decouples samples from specific binaries, dramatically reduces analysis overhead, and allows researchers to iterate on sampling methodologies while efficiently validating samples across diverse systems.
title_zh: Nugget：便携式程序片段
abstract_zh: 由于详细仿真成本高昂以及缺乏可移植的采样工具，对真实工作负载上的架构设计进行评估正变得越来越困难。现有的针对性采样技术通常与特定二进制文件绑定，开销较大，难以在不同系统间快速验证。为解决这些局限性，我们提出了Nugget——一个灵活的框架，支持在模拟器、硬件、架构差异以及库之间实现可移植的采样。Nugget利用LLVM中间表示（IR）进行与二进制无关的区间分析，进而生成轻量级、跨平台的可执行代码片段（称为“nuggets”），这些片段可在真实硬件上原生验证后，再用于仿真。该方法将采样数据与特定二进制文件解耦，显著降低分析开销，并使研究人员能够高效迭代采样方法，同时在多种系统上快速验证采样结果。

title: A Cybersecurity - Driven Software Metrics Framework for Continuos Risk Quantification and Anomaly Detection
authors: Arun Kumar Elengovan, Nandagopal Seshagiri, Isan Sahoo, Kathiresan Jayabalan
publish: 2026 7th International Conference on Mobile Computing and Sustainable Informatics (ICMCSI)
abstract: Modern systems running on software are in an increasingly hostile cyber environment where the traditional methods of risk assessment are not sufficient to provide continuous, context aware information of vulnerabilities and anomalous behavior. The root issue solved in this research is the lack of an integrated framework unifying the software engineering metrics and security telemetry to risk quantification for real-time use. This work is an attempt to develop a cybersecurity-driven software metrics framework to continuously measure, analyze, and predict security risk with the help of hybrid machine learning, graph-based dependency modeling, and attack path simulation. The proposed method combines static code indicators, runtime traces, threat intelligence and vulnerability scores into a multi-domain feature representation which is processed by supervised, unsupervised and graph neural models. Quantitative evaluation shows some huge improvements in comparison to top 5 baselines with an F1-score of 0.87, an AUC-ROC of 0.94, and reduces the mean time to detect incidents to 3.5 minutes. These results provide validation and proof of effectiveness for adoption of multi-modal feedback-based analytics pipeline for improving operational security posture. The study concludes that the combination of engineering metrics and security signals opens up the possibility of more accurate and pro-active risk management and to scale a path for the adoption of next generation DevSecOps automation.
title_zh: 面向持续风险量化与异常检测的网络安全驱动型软件度量框架
abstract_zh: 现代软件系统运行在日益恶劣的网络攻击环境中，传统的风险评估方法已无法持续、实时地提供关于漏洞和异常行为的上下文感知信息。本研究解决的核心问题是缺乏一个统一的框架，将软件工程度量与安全遥测数据整合，用于实时的风险量化。本文尝试构建一种以网络安全为导向的软件度量框架，借助混合机器学习、基于图的依赖建模以及攻击路径仿真技术，持续测量、分析并预测安全风险。所提出的方法将静态代码指标、运行时轨迹、威胁情报和漏洞评分整合为多领域特征表示，并通过监督学习、无监督学习及图神经网络模型进行处理。定量评估结果显示，与前五名基线方法相比，该方法在F1分数上达到0.87，AUC-ROC达到0.94，平均事件检测时间缩短至3.5分钟，显著提升了性能。这些结果验证并证明了多模态反馈式分析流水线在提升运营安全态势方面的有效性。研究结论表明，工程度量与安全信号的结合为实现更精准、主动的风险管理提供了可能，并为下一代DevSecOps自动化技术的推广铺平了道路。

title: RPU – A Reasoning Processing Unit
authors: Matthew Joseph Adiletta, Gu-Yeon Wei, David Brooks
publish: 2026 IEEE International Symposium on High Performance Computer Architecture (HPCA)
abstract: Large language model (LLM) inference performance is increasingly bottlenecked by the memory wall. While GPUs continue to scale raw compute throughput, they struggle to deliver scalable performance for memory bandwidth bound workloads. This challenge is amplified by emerging reasoning LLM applications, where long output sequences, low arithmetic intensity, and tight latency constraints demand significantly higher memory bandwidth. As a result, system utilization drops and energy per inference rises, highlighting the need for an optimized system architecture for scalable memory bandwidth. To address these challenges we present the Reasoning Processing Unit (RPU), a chiplet-based architecture designed to address the challenges of the modern memory wall. RPU introduces: (1) A Capacity-Optimized High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM-CO) that trades capacity for lower energy and cost; (2) a scalable chiplet architecture featuring a bandwidth-first power and area provisioning design; and (3) a decoupled microarchitecture that separates memory, compute, and communication pipelines to sustain high bandwidth utilization. Simulation results show that RPU performs up to <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$45.3 \times$</tex> lower latency and <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$18.6 \times$</tex> higher throughput over an H100 system at ISO-TDP on Llama3-405B.
title_zh: RPU——推理处理单元
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型（LLM）推理性能正日益受到“内存墙”问题的制约。尽管GPU持续提升计算吞吐量，但在内存带宽受限的工作负载上，其性能扩展能力却面临瓶颈。这一挑战在新兴的推理型LLM应用中尤为突出：长输出序列、低计算强度以及严格的延迟约束，均对内存带宽提出了更高要求。结果导致系统利用率下降，每次推理的能耗上升，凸显出对具备可扩展内存带宽能力的优化系统架构的迫切需求。

为应对上述挑战，本文提出了一种基于芯片小片（chiplet）架构的推理处理单元（Reasoning Processing Unit, RPU），专为应对现代内存墙问题而设计。RPU引入了三项关键技术：（1）容量优化型高带宽内存（HBM-CO），通过牺牲部分存储容量来实现更低的能耗与成本；（2）可扩展的芯片小片架构，采用“带宽优先”的功耗与面积分配设计；（3）解耦的微架构设计，将内存、计算与通信流水线分离，以维持高带宽利用率。

仿真结果表明，在Llama3-405B模型上，RPU在ISO-TDP条件下相比H100系统，可实现最高达45.3倍的延迟降低和18.6倍的吞吐量提升。

title: A Scoping Review of the Use of DSL in Software Applications: The Case of Chatbot Development
authors: Charaf Ouaddi, Adnane Souha, Lamya Benaddi, Abdeslam Jakimi, Rachid Saadane, Abdellah Chehri
publish: 2025 8th International Conference on Networking, Intelligent Systems &amp; Security (NISS)
abstract: Domain-Specific Languages (DSLs) have garnered considerable attention in software development for their capacity to expedite the creation of diverse applications, including mobile applications, chatbots, websites, and recommendation systems. By offering high-level abstractions tailored to specific domains, DSLs simplify development tasks and make software creation more accessible to users, thereby reducing the need for extensive programming expertise. This paper aims to examine the use of DSLs in software development through a comprehensive literature review, analyzing existing DSLs, the types of applications they support, and the technologies employed in their construction. Additionally, this study proposes a DSL specifically designed to accelerate chatbot development. This DSL provides a graphical interface for modeling conversations and includes code generation templates for chatbot source files.
title_zh: 软件应用中DSL使用情况的范围综述：以聊天机器人开发为例
abstract_zh: 领域特定语言（DSLs）在软件开发中引起了广泛关注，因其能够加速各类应用的开发，包括移动应用、聊天机器人、网站以及推荐系统等。通过为特定领域提供高层次的抽象，DSLs 简化了开发任务，使软件创建对用户更加友好，从而降低了对复杂编程技能的需求。本文通过全面的文献综述，探讨了 DSLs 在软件开发中的应用，分析了现有 DSLs 的特点、其所支持的应用类型以及构建过程中所采用的技术。此外，本研究提出了一种专为加速聊天机器人开发而设计的 DSL。该 DSL 提供了用于建模对话的图形化界面，并包含生成聊天机器人源代码的模板。

title: Semantic-Aware Helpdesk Resolution Using Federated Transformers and Real-Time Vector Matching and LLaMA
authors: Varsha Dange, Harshada Sawai, Manoj Mule, Ajinkya Matre, Sanika Shedbale, Piyush Pise, Kamal Joshi
publish: 2025 2nd Asia Pacific Conference on Innovation in Technology (APCIT)
abstract: This research introduces an advanced intelligent IT support chatbot framework that revolutionizes traditional helpdesk operations through the integration of cutting-edge natural language processing technologies and scalable vector search methodologies. The system addresses critical challenges in enterprise IT support environments, including prolonged response times, inconsistent solution quality, and escalating operational expenditures associated with manual ticket resolution processes. The proposed architecture employs a fine-tuned Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers (BERT) model for sophisticated multi-intent classification and semantic embedding generation of user queries and historical ticket databases. A high-performance Pinecone vector database facilitates rapid similarity-based retrieval through optimized cosine distance calculations, enabling contextually relevant historical issue identification within milliseconds. The system incorporates a domain-specialized Large Language Model for Advanced Reasoning (LLaMA) implementation that generates human-aligned, contextually appropriate responses using retrieval-augmented generation techniques. Key innovations include a privacy-preserving federated learning architecture enabling collaborative model enhancement across organizational boundaries without compromising sensitive enterprise data, integrated JIRA workflow automation for seamless ticket lifecycle management, and an intelligent uncertainty estimation mechanism providing reliable fallback protocols through human-in-the-loop interventions. Comprehensive evaluation demonstrates exceptional performance metrics: 93.2% intent classification accuracy, 180-millisecond average response latency, and 88.6% user satisfaction rates while automating 50% of routine queries with enterprise-grade security standards, representing a significant advancement in intelligent service desk automation technologies for large-scale organizational deployments.
title_zh: 基于联邦Transformer与实时向量匹配的语义感知客服解决方案及LLaMA应用
abstract_zh: 本研究提出了一种先进的智能IT支持聊天机器人框架，通过融合前沿的自然语言处理技术与可扩展的向量搜索方法，彻底革新了传统的帮助台运营模式。该系统有效应对了企业IT支持环境中存在的关键挑战，包括响应时间过长、解决方案质量参差不齐，以及因人工处理工单而带来的运营成本持续上升等问题。所提出的架构采用微调后的双向编码器表示模型（BERT），对用户查询及历史工单数据库进行复杂的多意图分类与语义嵌入生成。高性能的Pinecone向量数据库通过优化的余弦距离计算，实现毫秒级的相似性检索，快速识别上下文相关的历史问题。系统还集成了领域专用的大语言模型（LLaMA），利用检索增强生成技术，生成符合人类认知、语境恰当的回复。主要创新点包括：一种保护隐私的联邦学习架构，可在不泄露敏感企业数据的前提下，实现跨组织边界的模型协同优化；与JIRA工作流的深度集成，实现工单全生命周期的无缝管理；以及一种智能不确定性评估机制，通过“人在回路”干预提供可靠的备用响应方案。全面评估表明，该系统在性能指标上表现卓越：意图分类准确率达93.2%，平均响应延迟仅为180毫秒，用户满意度达88.6%，同时实现了50%常规查询的自动化处理，并满足企业级安全标准，标志着大规模组织部署中智能服务台自动化技术的重大进步。

title: An Efficient and Scalable Hardware Architecture for Number Theoretic Transform on FPGA with Design Automation
authors: Yilan Zhu, Geng Yang, Xingyu Tian, Dilshan Kumarathunga, Liang Kong, Xianglong Deng, Shengyu Fan, Guang Fan, Guiming Shi, Lei Chen, Bo Zhang, Yisong Chang, Shoumeng Yan, Zhenman Fang, Mingzhe Zhang
publish: 2026 IEEE International Symposium on High Performance Computer Architecture (HPCA)
abstract: Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) has become a promising approach to protecting data privacy in emerging application scenarios. Unfortunately, FHE suffers from significant processing speed degradation compared to plaintext computation, with one of the primary bottlenecks being the time-consuming Number Theoretic Transform (NTT). Therefore, accelerating NTT to accommodate various FHE parameters is crucial to advancing FHE towards practical use. With highly reconfigurable and performant logical fabrics, Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) have exhibited great potential in NTT acceleration. By decomposing large-point NTT with strong data dependency into independent and simple small-point NTTs, the emerging Ten-step NTT (TNTT) algorithms intuitively enable higher parallelism and thereby have the potential to explore better performance compared to traditional algorithms. However, our quantitative analysis reveals that TNTT exhibits significant performance degradation as parallelism increases due to additional varying-size transpositions and Hadamard products. This paper proposes AutoNest, an efficient and scalable hardware architecture, along with an accelerator auto-generation framework for TNTT. The proposed hardware architecture maximizes performance by 1) adopting a 2D block decomposition dataflow to address critical path delays in transpose logic, thereby improving clock frequency. 2) integrating algorithm-level costfree twiddle factor fusion to reduce the number of modular multiplications in Hadamard products, thereby allowing higher parallelism on chip. Moreover, we also deliver an accelerator generation framework conducting automated design space exploration to elaborate a performant TNTT architecture under the target FPGAs' resource budget for user-defined FHE parameters. Experimental results on the AMD-Xilinx U280 FPGA demonstrate that NTT accelerators generated by AutoNest achieve an average speedup of <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$2.31 \times$</tex> compared to prior designs.
title_zh: 一种高效且可扩展的基于FPGA的数论变换硬件架构及其设计自动化
abstract_zh: 全同态加密（FHE）已成为保护新兴应用场景中数据隐私的有前景方法。然而，与明文计算相比，FHE存在显著的处理速度下降问题，其中主要瓶颈之一是耗时的数论变换（NTT）。因此，加速NTT以适应各种FHE参数，对于推动FHE向实际应用发展至关重要。现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）凭借其高度可重构性和高性能逻辑结构，在NTT加速方面展现出巨大潜力。通过将具有强数据依赖性的大点数NTT分解为独立且简单的中小点数NTT，新兴的十步NTT（TNTT）算法直观地实现了更高的并行度，从而相较于传统算法具有探索更优性能的潜力。然而，我们的定量分析表明，随着并行度的提升，TNTT因额外的变尺寸转置操作和哈达玛积而出现显著的性能下降。本文提出AutoNest，一种高效且可扩展的硬件架构，以及一个针对TNTT的加速器自动生成框架。所提出的硬件架构通过以下方式最大化性能：1）采用二维块分解数据流，以缓解转置逻辑中的关键路径延迟，从而提升时钟频率；2）集成算法级无成本的旋转因子融合技术，减少哈达玛积中的模乘法次数，从而在芯片上实现更高的并行度。此外，我们还提供了一个加速器生成框架，能够进行自动化设计空间探索，在目标FPGA的资源预算下，为用户定义的FHE参数生成高性能的TNTT架构。在AMD-Xilinx U280 FPGA上的实验结果表明，由AutoNest生成的NTT加速器相比先前设计平均实现了2.31倍的加速比。

title: FlexiGen : An Automated AI Accelerator Generation Framework With Decoupled-Access-Execute and Dynamic Dataflows
authors: Xiaoling Yi, Man Shi, Joren Dumoulin, Jiacong Sun, Yunhao Deng, Ryan Antonio, Fanchen Kong, Yu Zhang, Yuqi Jiang, Marian Verhelst
publish: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems I: Regular Papers
abstract: Modern tensor applications, especially artificial intelligence (AI) applications, are evolving rapidly, posing a significant demand for agile hardware design. While numerous hardware generators have been developed, they suffer from three significant limitations: 1) they are either limited to a single dataflow/data type generation, failing to cater to the computational requirements of diverse workloads; 2) or focus only on the array level optimization, omitting system-level effects, such as the influence of on-chip memory bandwidth and contention; and 3) customized workload mapping/configuration is needed, resulting in increased programming complexity. To address these challenges, we propose FlexiGen, a flexible and extensible hardware generation framework, which targets diverse deep neural networks (DNN) tensor applications and can generate a complete synthesizable acceleration system at the RTL level with arbitrary dataflow and its combinations. Our key contributions are threefold: 1) we incorporate decoupled-access-execute architecture inside FlexiGen, enabling full system generation while maintaining flexibility and efficiency; 2) we propose a versatile spatial core generator that supports dynamic spatial dataflows and multiple data precisions in the same array and a compatible data streaming engine generator that can support arbitrary temporal dataflows and $N$ -dimensional data access patterns; and 3) we leverage a uniform programming interface and provide a customized kernel library, enabling agile configuration programming. We conduct an intensive evaluation to demonstrate the versatility of FlexiGen in dataflow accelerator generation and show the trade-offs of performance, area, and power across a wide range of dataflows and workloads at both the array level and system level. Our case study experiment shows FlexiGen’s usefulness as a hardware generator to rapidly generate desired dataflow acceleration systems. Compared with the state-of-the-art (SotA) hardware generation framework LEGO, FlexiGen achieves 36.79% and 57.16% less area and power when generating the same dual spatial dataflow design. FlexiGen is open-source and available at https://github.com/KULeuven-MICAS/snax_cluster
title_zh: FlexiGen：一种具有解耦访问执行与动态数据流的自动化AI加速器生成框架
abstract_zh: 现代张量应用，尤其是人工智能（AI）应用，正迅速发展，对灵活的硬件设计提出了巨大需求。尽管已开发出多种硬件生成工具，但它们仍存在三个显著局限：1）多数仅限于单一数据流或数据类型的生成，无法满足多样化工作负载的计算需求；2）仅关注阵列级优化，忽略了系统级影响，例如片上内存带宽和竞争带来的影响；3）需要为特定工作负载进行定制化映射与配置，导致编程复杂度增加。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了 FlexiGen，一个灵活且可扩展的硬件生成框架，旨在支持多种深度神经网络（DNN）张量应用，并能以任意数据流及其组合方式，在RTL级别生成完整的可综合加速系统。我们的主要贡献有三方面：1）在 FlexiGen 中引入解耦访问-执行架构，实现完整系统的生成，同时保持灵活性与高效性；2）提出一种通用的空间核心生成器，支持阵列内动态空间数据流和多种数据精度；并设计一个兼容的数据流引擎生成器，可支持任意时间数据流及 $N$ 维数据访问模式；3）采用统一的编程接口并提供定制化内核库，实现敏捷的配置编程。我们通过大量实验评估，验证了 FlexiGen 在数据流加速器生成方面的通用性，并展示了在阵列级与系统级上，不同数据流和工作负载之间性能、面积与功耗之间的权衡关系。案例研究实验表明，FlexiGen 作为硬件生成器，能够快速生成所需的数据流加速系统。与当前最先进的硬件生成框架 LEGO 相比，FlexiGen 在生成相同双空间数据流设计时，面积减少 36.79%，功耗降低 57.16%。FlexiGen 为开源项目，代码已发布于：https://github.com/KULeuven-MICAS/snax_cluster

title: The Cost of Dynamic Reasoning: Demystifying AI Agents and Test-Time Scaling from an AI Infrastructure Perspective
authors: Jiin Kim, Byeongjun Shin, Jinha Chung, Minsoo Rhu
publish: 2026 IEEE International Symposium on High Performance Computer Architecture (HPCA)
abstract: Large-language-model (LLM)-based AI agents have recently showcased impressive versatility by employing dynamic reasoning, an adaptive, multi-step process that coordinates with external tools. This shift from static, single-turn inference to agentic, multi-turn workflows broadens task generalization and behavioral flexibility, but it also introduces serious concerns about system-level cost, efficiency, and sustainability. This paper presents the first comprehensive system-level analysis of AI agents, quantifying their resource usage, latency behavior, energy consumption, and datacenter-wide power consumption demands across diverse agent designs and test-time scaling strategies. We further characterize how AI agent design choices, such as few-shot prompting, reflection depth, and parallel reasoning, impact accuracy-cost tradeoffs. Our findings reveal that while agents improve accuracy with increased compute, they suffer from rapidly diminishing returns, widening latency variance, and unsustainable infrastructure costs. Through detailed evaluation of representative agents, we highlight the profound computational demands introduced by AI agent workflows, uncovering a looming sustainability crisis. These results call for a paradigm shift in agent design toward compute-efficient reasoning, balancing performance with deployability under real-world constraints.
title_zh: 动态推理的成本：从AI基础设施视角解析AI智能体与测试时扩展
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的AI智能体最近展现出惊人的多功能性，其通过动态推理——一种与外部工具协同的自适应、多步骤过程——实现了这一突破。从静态的单轮推理转向智能体式的多轮工作流，虽然显著提升了任务泛化能力和行为灵活性，但也带来了系统级成本、效率和可持续性方面的严重挑战。本文首次对AI智能体进行了全面的系统级分析，量化了不同智能体设计及测试时扩展策略下的资源消耗、延迟行为、能耗以及数据中心整体的电力需求。我们进一步探讨了智能体设计选择（如少样本提示、反思深度、并行推理等）如何影响准确率与成本之间的权衡。研究发现，尽管增加计算资源能提升智能体的准确率，但其收益迅速递减，延迟方差显著扩大，基础设施成本难以持续。通过对代表性智能体的深入评估，我们揭示了AI智能体工作流所带来的巨大计算负担，暴露出潜在的可持续性危机。这些结果呼吁智能体设计范式的根本性转变：应向计算高效的推理方式演进，在实际部署约束下实现性能与可部署性的平衡。

title: A Sustainable Model of Security Automation: Approach and Analysis
authors: Chandrasekaran K, Aditya Rathod, Usha Divakarla
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Recent Advances in Computing and Systems (REACS)
abstract: Cybersecurity defenses must evolve as threats grow more complex and compliance requirements tighten. Traditional rule-based IDS and SIEM platforms often incur high false-positive rates and energy costs [1], [2], making long-term operation unsustainable. We propose an integrated security automation framework that embeds sustainability at its core. Our model combines AI-driven anomaly detection [2] for real-time threat identification, federated learning for privacy-preserving intelligence sharing [3], blockchain-based tamper-evident logging [4], and post-quantum cryptography to future-proof communications [6]. The architecture automates compliance with standards (e.g. NIST CSF, ISO/IEC 27001) and optimizes processing to minimize resource usage. Preliminary case studies in finance and healthcare demonstrate that this approach maintains high detection accuracy while significantly reducing false positives and energy consumption [5]. Overall, our sustainable security automation model enhances resilience and transparency without sacrificing efficiency [1], [5].
title_zh: 安全自动化的可持续模式：方法与分析
abstract_zh: 随着网络威胁日益复杂以及合规要求不断收紧，网络安全防御体系必须持续演进。传统的基于规则的入侵检测系统（IDS）和安全信息与事件管理（SIEM）平台往往产生较高的误报率和能源消耗[1]，[2]，难以支撑长期稳定运行。为此，我们提出一种以可持续性为核心理念的集成安全自动化框架。该模型融合了基于人工智能的异常检测技术[2]，实现威胁的实时识别；采用联邦学习实现隐私保护下的智能信息共享[3]；利用基于区块链的防篡改日志记录技术[4]，确保审计可追溯性；并引入后量子密码学技术，为通信安全提供面向未来的防护能力[6]。该架构能够自动满足各类安全标准（如NIST网络安全框架、ISO/IEC 27001）的合规要求，同时优化处理流程，最大限度降低资源消耗。初步在金融与医疗领域的案例研究显示，该方法在保持高检测准确率的同时，显著降低了误报率和能源消耗[5]。总体而言，我们的可持续安全自动化模型在不牺牲效率的前提下，显著提升了系统的韧性与透明度[1]，[5]。

title: IntelliVend Algorithm Based FSM Model for Book Vending Machine
authors: Anjusha Ashish Mahambrey, Putcha Pasyanthi, Paramasivam C.
publish: 2026 7th International Conference on Mobile Computing and Sustainable Informatics (ICMCSI)
abstract: The setting of book vending machines in libraries is of great importance because they offer easy access to reading materials that encourage learning outside of regular library hours. This research uses IntelliVend Algorithm-based RTL(Register Transfer Level)design of a book vending machine which uses Finite State Machine (FSM). This dual purpose Vending Machine has the ability to dispense a book while buying or has a book drop system while renting. This design has a variety of user actions such as book selection, payment processing, rental tracking, and change return. Cadence Incisive tool is used for simulation followed by Genus for synthesis and Innovus for physical design, including placement and routing, to meet the design's timing, power and area constraints. Overall the design provides a reliable and efficient solution for users to purchase or rent books from the machine.
title_zh: 基于智能售书机算法的有限状态机模型
abstract_zh: 在图书馆中设置图书自动售货机具有重要意义，因为它能够为读者提供便利的阅读材料获取途径，从而促进在图书馆常规开放时间之外的学习活动。本研究采用基于IntelliVend算法的RTL（寄存器传输级）设计方法，构建了一种基于有限状态机（FSM）的图书自动售货机。该双功能售货机既可实现购书功能，也可支持租书归还功能。设计支持多种用户操作，包括图书选择、支付处理、租借记录以及找零返还。设计流程中，使用Cadence Incisive工具进行仿真验证，随后通过Genus工具进行综合，再利用Innovus工具完成物理设计，包括布局与布线，以满足设计在时序、功耗和面积方面的约束要求。总体而言，该设计为用户提供了可靠且高效的购书或租书解决方案。

title: Automated Code Review and Quality Assurance System Using Static Analysis and Complexity Evaluation in Flask-Based Web Application
authors: Javvaji Venkatarao, Muthyala Harshitha, Javvaji Manvitha, Khushbu Kumari, Gooty Deekshitha
publish: 2026 7th International Conference on Mobile Computing and Sustainable Informatics (ICMCSI)
abstract: Development projects often face difficulties due to inconsistent code quality, which leads to increased technical debt and ineffective manual reviews. These issues make software difficult to maintain and reduce its reliability. This paper presents the Automated Code Review and Quality Assurance System, which examines coding style and performs static analysis, linting, and complexity evaluation. Flask is used as the framework to develop the web application. Developers can submit their source code and receive immediate feedback on potential issues. Radon is used to evaluate cyclomatic complexity, while Pylint performs style and error checking for Python files. The system is modular and can be extended to support other programming languages. For instance, tools such as Checkstyle or PMD can be used for Java. The application also provides linting warnings and categorizes functions based on their complexity. This step assists developers in identifying areas of the codebase that require modification. The design principles of the proposed real-time system emphasize modularity, scalability, and improved effectiveness compared to manual code review. The aim of this paper is to enhance software maintainability and reduce bugs by automating code quality checks and providing useful feedback. The roadmap for future enhancements includes support for multiple programming languages, integration with CI/CD pipelines, and the development of a visual dashboard with code fitness statistics. Experimental evaluation indicates that the proposed system provides faster and more consistent code quality assessment than traditional manual review approaches.
title_zh: 基于静态分析与复杂度评估的Flask Web应用自动化代码审查与质量保证系统
abstract_zh: 开发项目常常因代码质量不一致而面临困难，这导致技术债务增加，且人工审查效率低下。这些问题使得软件难以维护，降低了其可靠性。本文提出了一种自动化代码审查与质量保证系统，该系统能够检查编码风格，并进行静态分析、代码检查（linting）以及复杂度评估。系统基于Flask框架开发Web应用，开发者可提交源代码，并立即获得潜在问题的反馈。其中，Radon用于评估循环复杂度，而Pylint则对Python文件进行风格检查和错误检测。该系统具有模块化设计，可扩展以支持其他编程语言，例如，Java可使用Checkstyle或PMD等工具。此外，系统还提供代码检查警告，并根据复杂度对函数进行分类，帮助开发者识别需要改进的代码区域。所提出的实时系统设计强调模块化、可扩展性以及相较于人工审查更高的有效性。本文旨在通过自动化代码质量检查并提供有效反馈，提升软件可维护性并减少缺陷。未来改进的路线图包括支持多种编程语言、与CI/CD流水线集成，以及开发包含代码健康度统计信息的可视化仪表盘。实验评估表明，该系统在代码质量评估方面比传统人工审查方法更快且更一致。

title: DP-HLS: A High-Level Synthesis Framework for Accelerating Dynamic Programming Algorithms in Bioinformatics
authors: Anshu Gupta, Yingqi Cao, Jason Liang, Yatish Turakhia
publish: 2026 IEEE International Symposium on High Performance Computer Architecture (HPCA)
abstract: Dynamic programming (DP) is a widely used algorithmic paradigm, particularly in bioinformatics, finding applications in a wide spectrum of tasks, including read assembly, homology search, gene annotation, basecalling, and phylogenetic inference. Due to its computationally intensive nature, many ASIC- and FPGA-based accelerators have been proposed in recent years to accelerate specific tasks. However, DP algorithms in bioinformatics can vary considerably, and most existing solutions are customized for a single application, representing just one design point within the broader DP space. These implementations typically rely on low-level hardware description languages (HDLs), often requiring months of manual implementation effort. This paper introduces DP-HLS, a novel framework based on High-Level Synthesis (HLS) that simplifies and accelerates the development of a vast set of bioinformatically relevant 2-D DP algorithms in hardware. DP-HLS achieves this by introducing a new abstraction layer that decouples the front-end specification from predefined HLS-based back-end optimizations, enabling users to efficiently develop new 2-D DP kernels in C++ and deploy them on FPGAs without needing any expertise in hardware design or HLS. In our experience, DP-HLS significantly reduced the development time of new kernels (months to days) and produced designs with comparable resource utilization to open-source hand-coded HDL-based implementations and performance within <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{7. 7 - 1 6. 8 \%}$</tex> margin. DP-HLS is compatible with AWS<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">®</sup> EC2 F1 FPGA instances. To showcase its versatility, we implemented 15 diverse 2-D DP kernels using the DP-HLS framework, achieving <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$1.38-41 \times$</tex> improved cost-efficiency over state-of-the-art GPU and CPU baselines and providing the first open-source FPGA implementation for several of them. The DP-HLS codebase is available freely under the MIT license at https://github.com/TurakhiaLab/DP-HLS.
title_zh: DP-HLS：一种用于加速生物信息学中动态规划算法的高层次综合框架
abstract_zh: 动态规划（DP）是一种广泛使用的算法范式，尤其在生物信息学领域应用广泛，涵盖读段组装、同源性搜索、基因注释、碱基识别以及系统发育推断等多种任务。由于其计算密集的特性，近年来已提出多种基于ASIC和FPGA的加速器来提升特定任务的性能。然而，生物信息学中的DP算法差异较大，大多数现有解决方案均为单一应用量身定制，仅代表了DP整体空间中的一个设计点。这些实现通常依赖于低级硬件描述语言（HDL），往往需要数月的手动开发工作。本文提出了一种名为DP-HLS的新框架，基于高层次综合（HLS）技术，显著简化并加速了大量生物信息学相关二维DP算法在硬件上的开发。DP-HLS通过引入一种新的抽象层，将前端算法描述与预定义的HLS后端优化解耦，使用户能够仅用C++高效开发新的二维DP核，并直接部署到FPGA上，而无需具备硬件设计或HLS的专业知识。根据我们的实践经验，DP-HLS将新核函数的开发时间从数月缩短至数天，生成的设计在资源利用率上与开源的手写HDL实现相当，性能也仅比最优结果低7.7%至16.8%。DP-HLS兼容AWS® EC2 F1 FPGA实例。为展示其通用性，我们利用DP-HLS框架实现了15种多样化的二维DP核，相比最先进的GPU和CPU基线，实现了1.38至41倍的成本效益提升，并为其中多个算法提供了首个开源的FPGA实现。DP-HLS的代码库已通过MIT许可证免费开放，地址为：https://github.com/TurakhiaLab/DP-HLS。
